stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: “Greetings traveller! Have you found any ants yet?”*5 minutes later*Xhargreg: “Pff more questions about those bloody Nexar? Perhaps… for a bug leg… or even better 42 Bug Legs!”

But I guess that's not for me to ask.. However, I do require some kind of payment for this service. You see, I have a debt to pay to the mob, so I need you to recycle some stuff for me. If you do that I will help you.”

stats.label: The Nezerian Threat (0-0)
stats.title: The Nezerian Threat
stats.description: AF Agent: “We’ve been observing these Nezerians for a while now and we’ve acquired data indicating an incoming assault within the next two hours. I’m afraid we got some bad news, among the reinforcements there is a new kind of ship, unlike anything we’ve ever seen before. We have no clue how to take them down… although almost certain death… perhaps you could assist us in trying to hold this sector once they arrive?
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “Incredible! We were sure this would have been the end of us all. The Antor Federation is forever indebted to you!”

stats.completeDescription: AF Transmission: "They seem to be gone for now, but they will surely be back to create more trouble. However, we have found evidence they have aquired weapons from the cartel we discovered."

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 7
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”It’s large.. yes… but not like a Moth Alpha or… those Bionic Queens… I need to study the Genetic Control Implants used on the Bionic Queens, about 8 of those should be enough, they might be useful in regulating their growth cycle… just think about the potentials here!” *Xhargregs mind floats off into his own little world… probably filled with even more gigantic wasps….*
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Great! One Implant is actually enough… but I like the number 8 more… anyway return here with the implants… I need to try them right away! Hahahahehahgrh… oh and I even have a reward for you!”

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 3
stats.description: Perhaps he would be more willing to talk if there’s any business to be gained. Gather at least 100 pieces of metal scraps, then return to Wrengher Jones recycle station and recycle it.

I really don’t. Alright, if you help me out I’ll tell you what I know. The high hostile activity in this sector is threatening to ruin my business, hardly anyone dares to come here these days. Your ship looks quite capable… eh? Take out the 10 closest hostile stations and I’ll tell you what I know.”

stats.description: Captain [player], for many years the antor federation decided to not attack the Nether blobs that orbit the black holes of Durian and Fulzar but after the increasing number of attacks against our loyal pilots we request your aid in annihilating their assualt forces

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 23 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 23
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”...”*8 hours later*Xhargreg: ”It’s done!!! I’ve succeeded! A teleporting Wasp! The world has change for the better today! Hehehehhrgrhgrhghrgh”Crew: “Oh no…”Xhargreg: ”I also fitted your Bionic Larva with a Teleportation Device… and there’s another pile of those glowing things… apparently the Wasps are attracted to those… I can’t possibly imagine why... just throw it away or something...”Crew: “Thanks?”Truly Gigantic Mutated Teleporting Wasp: *Happy Bzz!*Crew: “I’m not sure if what we have done today really is a good thing…”Truly Gigantic Mutated Teleporting Wasp: *Sad bzz...*

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 1

stats.description: Operative Smith: “After the last few weeks of battle we can tell it’s starting to take a toll on them. The strength of their onslaught has significantly weakened! stats.description: Kill [amount] enemies of any kind. This time you don't have as much time, so please hurry up!

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 9
stats.description: Operative Smith: “We have managed to gather a lot more intel on the Nexar while you were gone. The Nexar are ruled by three Emperors. Apparently the Nexar value strength in battle as the main qualification for any position in their government. Every 4th year a competition is held, a battle royal until only three are left alive. These three are given the title of Emperor and are placed in charge of the empire for the next four years. Our agents reports that they await challenges from everyone in the middle of the 5ht circle. If you somehow could defeat them… maybe this war will finally end.”
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Unbelievable! You did it! Finally we beat the Nexar!”

stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Excellent work captain, this assassination business seems to suit you very well.”

stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “Thank you! Take out that station and land on the planet and check out what’s going on with the colony While you’re down there feel free to scavenge for minerals.”

stats.completeDescription: Dr. Mira: “I guess that could explains things, perhaps that damaged battleship is one of the attacking ships from Azuron that fled here. I hope you have already guessed what must be done? Destroy the Dominator and acquire it’s log files.

stats.label: Weapons Cartel: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Weapons Cartel: Part 5
stats.description: AF Transmission: "You have already done a lot so far. However, the weapons originate from a Nezerian ship called the Rotator in the Kapello system. Please destroy it to make sure we can stop the weapon transports.
stats.completeDescription: AF Transmission: "With the Rotator gone we managed to stop a lot of weapon transports into this system. The technology found on the Rotator is Nezerian. Its a hostile spieces most active in the Gellan and Rapir System. Although we have very little information about whats happening in the Rapir system.You have done us a great favour. Collect the reward and we might contact you again."

stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 5

stats.completeDescription: Intelligent Sponge: “bza zz”Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp*Krux: “I think it said something along the lines of, ‘ahhh.. fresh ooze. “Intelligent Sponge: “zra zap bzzzaaarr bzp”Krux: “It wants another meal, but this time it wants an Ice Giant. I heard they exist on the planet Orgasin in Mitrillion..”

stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 8

stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Gimme gimme gimme!!!”*2h hours later* Crew: “How about handing over that reward you mentioned?”Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “BZZZZZ!”Xhargreg: ”Sure…. just take a bug-leg... there is a pile somewhere...”

stats.title: Enemy Takedown [amount]

stats.label: (timed): Push back the Nexar Army! (100-0)
stats.title: Push back the Nexar Army!
stats.description: The Nexar are reeling from their failed preemptive assualt, now is the time to attack! Strike them with extreme prejudice.

stats.label: The Cult: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: The Cult: Part 5
stats.description: Kaalifax: "I need you to recycle a few engine parts... uhmm... yes, they are somewhat rare. But I think you can make it, can't you?"
stats.completeDescription: Note from Kaalifax: "Thanks for paying my debt.. hehehe... bye!"

stats.label: (PvP-5) Gaining fame. (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-5) Gaining fame
stats.description: Excellent work! We have noticed a major drop in pirate activity in your system. Please take this, it's the bounty for the pirates you took down. There's always more work to do out there. Keep taking down those pirates and you'll be handsomely rewarded!

stats.label: (timed): Dimensional Rift (90-0)
stats.title: Dimensional Rift
stats.description: According to our readings there are mythical creatures living on the other side of a black hole. We have also noticed that the renegades sometimes try to prevent the black hole from expanding. Destroy to science vessel  to create a dimensional right so we can study these creatures.
stats.completeDescription: unknown voice: "Ahh.. very interesting indeed."

stats.label: (timed): Fanatic Tank Wars! (40-0)
stats.title: Fanatic Tank Wars!
stats.description: Rumor has it that a fanatic Tank is roaming around somewhere in the Gellan system. Find it and destroy it if you can.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 17 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 17
stats.description: Return to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin and check out the new wasps he discovered. (You can also pick up the Death Cloud)
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”What do you think? Aren't these giant wasps amazing? Hmmm.. wonder if the  mutagenic poison you brought back last time had anything to do with it... are you really sure you don't wanna try some? Oh, right, right, here you go, the Death Cloud… one of my finest creations… I hope you enjoy it! It was almost endurable to work with you… perhaps you could be of further use sometime in the future… once a way to re enter Fulzar has been discovered. Oh and if you encounter any Nezerians.. please do feel free to test the Death Cloud on them… Hehehehhrgrhghghgh..."

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 19 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 19
stats.description: Assist in capturing the Nexar Hangar located in the first circle!
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Excellent, this might give us access to Nexar technology!”

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Triad! (5-0)
stats.title: Kill the Triad!
stats.description: There is a Triad protecting Rocky in Kapello. We need urgent access to the surface of Rocky, please take it down now!

stats.label: (timed): Monachus Destruction (73-0)
stats.title: Monachus Destruction
stats.description: Destroy [amount] Monachus to secure and help the Antor Federation defend Erath from the Aureus expansion.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 17 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 17
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Here have a Bionic Larva… I duplicated the Nezerians Bionic technology and applied it to a more useful creature...”Crew: “Errr… what? You want us to go inside that… thing?”Xhargreg: ”Go try it out! Preferably on those Nezerians… they had stomach of calling me mad…. actually… when thinking about it…. I don’t know if they have a stomach… would you mind checking that for me? Hahahhahagagggrggr...”

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 3
stats.description: Ono seem to be a researcher doing field research on infested planets in Kritillian space. Find her and ask her to help Osho build this new weapon.
stats.completeDescription: Ono wasn't to pleased to hear from her "friend" and she doesn't believe in armed conflict but agreed she could help us if we helped her with the research on the infestation.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 9
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”I’ve run into a little problem… I don’t know if you have noticed… but those damn Nezerians are immune to poisons and highly resistant to kinetic attacks… this unfortunately results in an unfair advantage over my poor wasps… *sob*... you need to do something about this! The Renegades in Zergilin have developed a toxin that reduces kinetic resistances…hrmm... this could prove to be the key… go to my old lab in Zergilin”Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “bzzzz???”
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Kill 32 Renegade Spies and collect samples from their Corrosive Missiles”Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “bzzzz!!!”Crew: “Eeeek! Where did that come from???”

stats.label: (timed): Data Recycle 2! (11-0)
stats.title: Data Recycle 2!
stats.description: We have achieved a break through towards finding new data in mediumdata chips, but we need more spare parts. Please recyclesome for us!

stats.label: (PvP-1) Time to pick sides (3-0)
stats.title: (PvP-1) Time to pick sides
stats.description: It's time for you to choose what you want this universe to be like. You can either strive to uphold some order in the universe ... or kill, murder, prey on the weak, and take what should've been yours anyway.You can either go hostile and kill any player in your way, or defend the order and kill any hostile troublemakers you can find. Reach either 15 Pirate-Reputation or 15 Police-Reputation.

stats.label: (timed): Locust Frenzy (20-0)
stats.title: Locust Frenzy
stats.description: We heard that killing [amount] locusts might give you luck, and a decent reward.

stats.label: Reach Level 45 (45-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 45
stats.description: Who are you really Captain [player]? Very few has shown us these kinds of skills. But, we need to to get even more powerful. Level 45 is a big step forward to becoming one of the few true heroes.

stats.label: The New Frontier: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: The New Frontier: Part 3
stats.description: Talk to Lieutenant Nguyen at the recycle station
stats.completeDescription: Lieutentant Nguyen: “Hmm.. so you are the latest recruit? I hope Admiral Ymer’s instincts are better than mine, because you don’t seem to be ready yet. The Aureus are not ordinary aliens, they use teleport to instantly appear in front of you, incinerate you and then teleports back to their domain. And to make everything worse, the Nezerians, in their desperate attempt to survive have managed to develop a bionic technology to fully control Moth Queens and their kin. We are almost certain the lunatic and mad man Xhargreg is involved somehow. But for now this has balanced the sector and stopped the Aureus from reaching us. Assist Ace with their defences and counter attacks against the Nezerians.”

stats.label: (timed): Dread Queen! (30-0)
stats.title: Dread Queen!
stats.description: Captain, we have a hideous creature lurking in Mitrillion. Please go there and kill it, incinerate whatever bug you might find on your way.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 9
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”What took you so long? Well… fine fine, no need to get upset... good job... have a vial of Cyanide… it’s always good to have one of those… who knows when you end up attending a dull dinner party...  hehehgghruhuMeanwhile I discovered something useful, there’s some strange kind of heavily armoured insectoids in Vibrilion, I believe they hold the key to the ultimate poison. "
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”Do you know what’s annoying? There’s some kind of exploding moths in Mitrilion.. Really annoying, they blew up my scout drones. How am I supposed to scout for toxins with those things around? Go kill them… all of them."

stats.label: The New Frontier: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The New Frontier: Part 1
stats.description: Captain, we have a mission to recruit potential pilots for the new frontier in Fulzar. Visit the warp gate in Vibrilian and give them the password: GIlgam35h. This will help you to pay for the warp license to Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Thank you for entering the password. Your reward will contain 20k steel.

stats.label: (timed): Transport assistance (6-0)
stats.title: Transport assistance
stats.description: The food supplies on Erath in Hyperion are empty. Please help us with a transfer from Illion (Durian) to Erath.

stats.description: We need some urgent supplies transferred from [location1] to [location2]. Do you have time to help us?

stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 2
stats.description: Jahaar successfully extrapolated the data stream and discovered how to unlock hidden information embedded inside data chips. Unfortunately these data chips degrade fast. Take this algorithm and use it to decrypt and copy the data on a chip before it has time to decay. You must go and obtain a new simple data chip and decode it.

stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 3

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Zappers (9-0)

stats.title: Transport Needed
stats.description: We need some minerals transported from the Recycle Station in Hyperion to the Upgrade station. Can you give us a hand Captain [player]?

stats.title: Alpha Hunt Kritillian
stats.description: I want you to get rid of the alpha male that has infested the orbit of Negundo. Be careful, it is in a frenzy and kills anything that invades its territory.

stats.label: We are under attack!: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: We are under attack!: Part 2
stats.description: Operative Smith: We have identified an enemy commander, whom we believe is in charge of the invading force. Take him out and maybe they will retreat back...
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: Seems like their ranks are disoriented for now. But there is still no sign of a withdrawal... We have to think of something else.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 10
stats.description: Return to AFIS HQ in Arrenius to receive any extracted intel.
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “Bleh, I don’t want to have deal with those fanatics ever again… they are just completely nuts.. he wouldn’t stop talking about the golden gods and that they will soon return and annihilate all heathens… We were unable to get any useful information.”

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 18 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 18
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”You think it’s too slow? Pff… actually I just had a great idea… almost a stroke of genius… have you noticed that those odd golden ships seems to have the ability to teleport? Yes… exactly TELEPORTING WASPS!!! This must be the greatest invention… since fire… or nuclear fusion...? Go investigate this Aureus Teleport Technology.. “Crew: “Oh no… Captain, why did you have to give him that idea??”
stats.description: Go kill a few enemies…. with the Bionic Larva…Crew: “Captain... why do we have to do this…?

stats.label: (timed): Enemy takedown Kapello (5-0)
stats.title: Enemy takedown Kapello
stats.description: We're getting reports of enemy reinforcements in Kapello. Take down 50 enemies and receive this fine reward.

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 1
stats.description: Operative Smith: “We have been working hard to identify the key links in the enemy chain of command. Now we need someone with *special* skills to eliminate these targets. A large bounty awaits for the one who manage to *eliminate* the designated target.The first target is Lieutenant Xhaveris. He was last spotted commanding the defence near the entrance of the first circle. He commands a Nexar Tank class ship. Be careful not to end up facing the wrong side of a Tank class ship, it’s armed with an extremely deadly short range gatling gun. It’s weaknesses is its’ weak navigational capability.”
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Excellent work captain, your skills never stops amazing me. Ready for more work?”

stats.label: (timed): Blob Invasion (11-0)
stats.title: Blob Invasion
stats.description: The infestation has evolved and produced new threats. Blobs have emerged in the Hozar system and we need to kill [amount] of them.

stats.label: (timed): The Daemon hunt 3! (75-0)
stats.title: The Daemon hunt 3!
stats.description: A new form of bionic Daemons have appeared in Fulzar, please help the federation and kill a few of them.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 5
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”Remember the mutagenic poison you discovered from the Experimental Macrophages back in Sarkinon? It seems like the Nezerians have perfected this toxin, so why don’t you go and make yourself useful... collect about…. a bit of it? I would recommend filling that ship of yours to the brim with the mutagenic poison… by doing it that way you can get enough in just one trip! Think about the time you’ll save!!!  Hehehehhrgrhghghgh!”*Gather Poison from 64 Bionic Macrophages*
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Hurry back here!! I can’t wait to make more giant wasps!!”Crew: “Are you sure Captain?”Crew: “I hate wasps!!”Crew: “Uhg... this stuff can’t be healthy, let’s just dump it somewhere… ”

stats.label: (timed): Egg Locust (20-0)
stats.title: Egg Locust
stats.description: There is a special egg locust nesting in flower cocoons in the Vibrilian system. Find them and kill [amount] of them.

stats.label: (timed): Death to Scarabs! (29-0)
stats.title: Death to Scarabs!
stats.description: A mutated bionic scarab has been seen in Sarkinon. We have suspect the Nezerian to be the creator of this new alien, but we need more information to make sure. Kill [amount] for the cause!

stats.label: Reach Level 20 (20-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 20
stats.description: How can we say this? You do have ... some ... skills. Really. But still, there's a lot of rookie punks out there trying to get to the top. Are you one of the few that can handle it?

stats.label: (timed): Electrocute (22-0)
stats.title: Electrocute
stats.description: They are electric and deadly, somehow we think they originate from a larger being in Sarkinon. But that is only speculation so far. Please kill [amount].

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 12 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 12
stats.description: For the fireworks, land on Exretorum in Cynapsian and kidnap a dread moth larva!
stats.completeDescription: Crew: “Yup, you are indeed crazy! But I’m eager to see how this turns out.”

stats.label: The Cult: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: The Cult: Part 7
stats.description: Travel to the nearest warp gate.
stats.completeDescription: Jane: "That was close, we almost got vaporised. You can let me go now, I have what I need now. I will hunt down my brother and free him from the Fanatics. Take this reward as a token of my gratitude."

stats.label: (timed): Skirmisher Wars (100-0)
stats.title: Skirmisher Wars
stats.description: The Nexar Skirmisher utilises a portable wave generator which emits waves of concentrated light at the target. It's an extremely powerful weapon..one we would like to utilise. Destroy 100 Skirmishers and you shall be given a prototype...

stats.label: (timed): Insane in the Motherbrain (30-0)
stats.title: Insane in the Motherbrain
stats.description: We have intercepted an interesting anomaly in Neurona The entity is unknown but the local space traders call it "The Motherbrain". Investigate and finish it off, whatever it is.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 16 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 16
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Great news everyone! I've discovred a new kind of wasps in my kitchen. Come back and check them out right away! Oh... and the Death Cloud is done, you can pick it up at the same time…"
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”Go kill the Dread Moths in Cynapsian. Maybe... about… ALL OF THEM... should be enough…”

stats.label: Another Dimension: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Another Dimension: Part 2
stats.description: AF Lieutenant Abraham: "The data indicates the Renegades have a cloaked science vessel in Durian working on dark matter technology. Dark matter is potentially the most dangerous element in the universe so its ciritcal that we stop them. Goto the AF Security Gate in Durian and scan for any unusual impulse signatures that could indicate a moving vessel."
stats.completeDescription: AF Lieutenant Abraham: "We have found the science vessel. The scan also indicates that they are trying to contain its singularity core. Probably to harvest dark matter. Experimenting on the singularity might also cause a space distorsion and create a dimensional rift. We need to stop them before that happens!"

stats.label: Reach Level 2 (2-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 2
stats.description: Captain! The enemies are getting stronger and we predict harder challenges ahead. Reach level 2 and we will show our appreciation.

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 5
stats.description: Land on Glictan in Zergilin and collect money from a renegade fraud called Murxim.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: "That was the last one, you should have enough resources for Fulzar now, or at least not far from it. I will update my astrometric database, let me know when we are ready for Fulzar."

stats.label: (timed): Kill Servus! (25-0)
stats.title: Kill Servus!
stats.description: A new moth breed has been seen in Sarkinon. The Servus is extremly lethal and is followed by invulnerable locust. Please irradicate them!

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Spawners! (5-0)
stats.title: Kill the Spawners!
stats.description: The enemies are assembled inside the spawners. Help us take down [amount] of them Captain!

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 2
stats.description: Operative Smith: “The second target is Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis. He was last spotted patrolling the first circle. He likes to command his troops from the back line, while sniping his enemies with deadly accuracy. Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis pilots a Nexar Projector class ship. The Nexar Projector is weak in close combat, they always tries stay at range and specialized for long range combat. A hefty bounty awaits whoever can bring me his head!”
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Again… excellent work. Those sniper types are not so thought when it gets close and personal, right?

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 1
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Good job, now bring all that poison to me at my research station in Zergilin"
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”What a lovely system! Think of all the possible opportunities here.. all those cute little bugs.. hmm although forget about that ‘little’ part… Hehehehergrgh. Uhm, right, what was I doing? Oh, right, talking to you... see those green lite cute moth like insects out there? Doesn't the color of their poison just look so exciting? Gather poison from 75 of those and I might… or might not reward you…"

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 7
stats.completeDescription: Fanatics Pilot: “I will never tell you heathen scum anything!”
stats.description: Destroy a fighter belonging to the ‘Fanatics’ in Kritillian and capture the pilot.

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 1
stats.description: We have discovered a data stream containing information about secrets hidden on encrypted data chips. You should talk to a cyborg named Jahaar on Centurion in the Kapello system about this.
stats.completeDescription: Jahaar told us there is hidden information inside many of the data chips. If you are interested we could work together to unlock some hidden secret technologies.

stats.label: (timed): Dominator Destruction (6-0)
stats.title: Dominator Destruction
stats.description: A huge battleship has been spotted in Durian and is currently spreading terror throughout the system. Destroy it and we will reward you handsomely.

stats.label: (timed): Larva Extermination (10-0)
stats.title: Larva Extermination
stats.description: I urgently need you to kill [amount] larva for critical research on Tesla coils. Will you be able to finish them in time?

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 7
stats.description: Hand over the kidnapped Ice Giant to the somewhat evil sponge.
stats.completeDescription: Intelligent Sponge: “bza zz zzrrat ttzzz”Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp*Krux: “See, its not truly evil.. now it wants a Nezerian soldier.. This is getting interesting! It promised more artifacts in exchange.”

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 6
stats.description: Go search for Xhargreg at his research station in Zergelin.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Why hello there! Who might you be? Never mind... there are more important issues at hand… hmmm wait a minute... do bugs have hands? I meant there are more important issues at *BUG LEGS*! HAHAhahehhehaaha... *coughing*..  haHAehhehaaha.. ehgh.. why are you still here?” *Xhargreg shuts the door*You can only think of one way to get Xhargreg attention… guess it’s back to Hozar again.

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 3
stats.description: Let’s go to the Antor Federation Armoury and investigate if we can get any better weapons.
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “Find anything you like? Weapons is the only thing that’s not in low supply around here. Everything has gone to hell lately, since the downfall of the Antor Federation started. We used to control the entire Antor sector… sigh... but now.. we can’t even keep our citizens safe. There are pirates, slavers, cannibals, raiders and fanatics wreaking havoc everywhere. The key to survival is to keep your tech ahead of everyone elses, a very costly endeavour. One effective way of acquiring resources if through salvaging, I can talk with an associate and get you a special deal on junk.”

stats.label: (timed): Dr. Drak (22-0)
stats.title: Dr. Drak
stats.description: The mad and mentally unstable Dr. Drak was last seen in the Hozar sector. He is wanted dead for terrible crimes against humanity.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 8
stats.description: Bring the prisoner to the AFIS HQ in Arrenius.
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “Here is your receipt for one prisoner, we will contact you with the results of the information retrieval services... hehe... oh and please do be careful the receipt will self-destruct in 30 seconds… hehe…”

stats.label: The Swarm: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The Swarm: Part 1
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Keryn: "Great work captain! We managed to stop the invasion eventually. But unfortunately we can already see another one forming in the Gellan system and it will be here in about an hour. Prepare yourself to squash some more bugs!"
stats.description: Lieutenant Keryn: "We need valiant defenders against the swarm invasions that threatens Arrenius every hour or so. Kill the insects that eat armor plating first, I recommend the flame thrower."

stats.label: (timed): Missile Hunter (14-0)
stats.title: Missile Hunter
stats.description: There is a rumour that an elite missile ship can be found near Graven. Kill [amount] of them but be careful, they are guarded by something much more dangerous.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 8
stats.description: Return to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin with the Macrophage toxins. Could there possibly be a real reward this time?
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Most exquisit… this venom is just amazing. A single gram could kill thousands… and you brought back several barrels. I must be the luckiest person in the world… heheherhghrhgh.It has a very strange property of transferring the victims vital energies to the infector... I’m sure this could be highly useful if weaponized… luckily I love making weapons… what could be more fun? Oh, right, a reward… hmmm… have this wasp stinger… Now for next part"

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 3
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Interesting data… this system is overrun by these bug like aliens… numerous but fairly weak... good… these bug like creatures have recently been starting to pour into the Arrenius system... they may potentially pose a threat. We should identify the source… and by we I mean you… get going… investigate the flower like structures“
stats.description: Investigate the strength of the enemies in the area. Kill at least 75 enemies of various types.

stats.label: (timed): Bug Smash II (18-0)
stats.title: Bug Smash II
stats.description: Yet another Bug Smash is needed in the [h]Vibrilian System[/h]. Kill [amount] of the enemies shown below.

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 5
stats.description: Destroy [amount] Infested Fanatics to impress the tribe even more.
stats.completeDescription: Priest: “A miracle has happened! The god has bestowed great power in me, thus I will continue to watch over you, my beloved, but very few children. Hail me and let the fiest of seven sould begin!”

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 7
stats.description: Head back to the warpgate in Sarkinon and give the Helping Hand Foundation a short explanation of the neolitic tribes internal conflicts and the horrific sacrifices made to a local diety.
stats.completeDescription: The Helping Hand Foundation: “Err… a population of one? Sacrifices to a dragon? A thousand virgins entering the sky? I think we are better off with someone else in the future. Thank you for trying though.”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 41 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 41
stats.description: Talk to Admiral Ymer at New Erath in Fulzar when you are prepared to strike the Aurus Executor.
stats.completeDescription: Admiral Ymer: “This is it! Let’s go to war! It’s now or never! This will be our best chance to destroy that monstrosity! Get ready to engage the Enemy! All ships: Forward!”

stats.label: (PvP-7) A new weapon (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-7) A new weapon
stats.description: Welcome to the Silver Wing Squadron! We've just finished developing a new weapon, the X27-S Smart Gun. This is a weapon specially designed to kill small, highly maneuverable ships. If you gain enough standing we'll share it with you. And remember: Never show the pirate scum any mercy!

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 14 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 14
stats.description: Go to the Antor Federation Research Station in Hyperion and have them decrypt the logs from the Dominator.
stats.completeDescription: Dr. Mira: “Finally, felt like it took forever… It seems like these files were partly damaged and only contains some limited information. The ship belonged to a species that refers to themselves as the Nezerians, hmmm… I’ve never heard that name before. Have you? The logs mentions receiving extreme damage during a battle in sector DRPZ-41292. Do you think this sector refers to Azuron? The Dominator must have been a remarkable ship given the amount of damage it received. I wonder what could’ve caused that amount of damage? A section of the log explains that the warp drive was destroyed during the battle, leaving the ship unable to swiftly return home. AMAZING! Think about it, a ship capable of warp jumping without the used of a warp gate, UNBELIEVABLE! We should inform Lieutenant Kreiger about our findings.”

stats.label: Another Dimension: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Another Dimension: Part 3
stats.description: AF Lieutenant Abraham: "I've concluded that the best option is to destroy science vessel. Its clear that they are going through with this experiement and we should do a pre-emptive strike while the vessel is vulnerable and without protection. Its cloaked and orbiting the black hole but we have identified the impulse signature, so you should be able to see it now."
stats.completeDescription: Renegade Scientist: "Are you mad!?! We have been trying to close this dimensional rift and now y.... khsszzzz.... khsxzzzz.... khhhszzzz.. khzzz.... idiot.... khzzz..."Fanatic Abraham: "Hahaha... finally all heretics will be punished for their sins. Worship the new gods and despair!"

stats.label: (timed): Recycle 50 (3-0)
stats.title: Recycle 50
stats.description: Captain, we put the recycle stations out there for a reason. Are you really using them? We have a mission for you: Bring some junk to the recycle station and... recycle.

stats.label: (timed): Kill [amount] Aureus Warriors (75-0)
stats.title: Kill [amount] Aureus Warriors
stats.description: Kill [amount] Aureus warrios and help the federation against the overwhelming Aureus.

stats.label: (timed): Nezerian Ultimate! (45-0)
stats.title: Nezerian Ultimate!
stats.description: We have discovered a HUGE mothership in Sarkinon. It is guarded by battleships, fighters and destroyers. This one is insanely hard to take down with a single ship so we recommend that you gather a team.

stats.label: (timed): Fulzar Cruise! (65-0)
stats.title: Fulzar Cruise!
stats.description: Destroy [amount] cruisers in Fulzar and help the federation in their attempt to colonize New Erath.

stats.label: Reach Level 4 (4-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 4
stats.description: We can see you have potential, Captain. But if you reach level 4 - we will truly know you are dedicated to your task. That is, to Flux it ... blast them all!

stats.label: Spawner takedown (1-3)
stats.title: Spawner takedown
stats.description: The spawners are the home of the enemies. Killing enemies is great, but killing spawners is even better!Take one down to secure the area from enemies.

stats.label: (timed): Seeker and Destroy (3-0)
stats.title: Seeker and Destroy
stats.description: Innocent transport vessels has been shot down by patrolling Seekers. Help us take some of them down and receive a reward.

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 8
stats.description: Operative Smith: “The next target is something completely different, if you choose to go after this one…. I don’t expect to see you again. The mark is Admiral Zhersis, so far we have no intel on this one. The agents that have been dispatched to investigate this target have all vanished without a trace. There is a huge reward waiting for anyone that can bring me Admiral Zhersis head.”Find and kill Admiral Zhersis
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Outstanding captain! To be fair I never expected to see you again. You keep exceeding our wildest expectations! You have really earned the reward this time!”

stats.label: Stolen Technology: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Stolen Technology: Part 2
stats.description: The warp trail leads to Hozar and the planet Melifon. We should prepare for locust spawners, they are extremly nasty and dangerous but weak against Nova charges.
stats.completeDescription: Pheww...Never thought we would suceed with that. However, it seems like the trail stops here. It's almost as if they vanished into thin air. Maybe we should land on the other planets as well to look for clues.

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 7
stats.completeDescription: Dr. Mira: “Good to know there’s nothing to worry about. I’ve found an interesting lead, apparently a mysterious battleship have been randomly attacking ships in this region. A blackmarket transporter called “Mark” recently had a run in with it. He barely managed to escape, he’s currently trying to get his ship repaired at Ronduria, head over there and find out what he knows.
stats.description: Check out the strength of the hostiles in the vicinity, takeout 6 nearby battle stations.

stats.label: (timed): Alien Touchdown! (50-0)
stats.title: Alien Touchdown!
stats.description: We have orders for you to land on the planet Exretorum in the Cynapsian system. It is extremly difficult and the planet is guarded by an insane amount of Dread Moths.

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 1
stats.description: The Helping Hand Foundation: “Examin the planet Amadun in Sarkinon and observe the neolitic tribe that has been discovered there. Be careful and don’t disturb their culture. Report back to us when you are ready.”
stats.completeDescription: Priest: “A new bright star has appeared on the night sky and its calling for our devotion. Worship the god and we will recieve eternal blessing in our afterlife! Bless us all with his knowledge!”

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 3
stats.description: Kill [amount] Viscous Blades to practise your omnipotence.
stats.completeDescription: Priest: “Bless us all! The saviour has once more appeared on the sky and the spinning daemons were vanquished. Hail our saviour! Prepare a the fiest of a thousand virgins!”

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 3
stats.description: The data chip you have collected contains information on how to create some kind of weapon. Go to Centurion again and convince Jahaar to build this weapon for you.
stats.completeDescription: Hmm... Jahaar told us we could get the new weapon if we helped him gather data on the Elite Stalkers in the northern Hyperion.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 13 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 13
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Hurry!!! Hand over the samples!! Excellent!!” *jumps up and down*Crew: “And… the reward you mentioned? Let me guess a bug leg?”Xhargreg: ”No… I can’t spare anything that valuable… take that pile of glowing cube like things that the wasps brought back… for some reason???”Crew: “Errr… is that a pile of Artifacts??”Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzz!!!!”Crew: “Eeeek!”Crew: “I supposes that’s a ‘yes’… errr… thanks?”

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 11 (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 11
stats.description: Lieutenant Kreiger: “I don’t think there’s much left for someone like you to do around here. There’s a warp gate in the northeastern corner of Hyperion. The Warp Gate provides a fast way to travel between systems and without a Warp Gate it would take about two years to reach the closest neighbouring system. The Antor Federation actually built most of the warp gates, although it was during the golden era, more than 500 years have past since then end of that age.”
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “It was a pleasant surprise to encounter a captain as capable as you, I wish you the best of luck in your future adventures.”

stats.label: (timed): Fanatics are not fun (9-0)
stats.title: Fanatics are not fun
stats.description: [player], there are Fanatics in Arrenius, we need to to take at least one of them down. Beware though, these are tough ones...

stats.label: (timed): Plagued Locust (10-0)
stats.title: Plagued Locust
stats.description: Greetings [player], I need you to get rid of [amount] locust. But I am not sure you will be able to finish it in time. Hurry!

stats.label: (timed): Mandrom Terror (10-0)
stats.title: Mandrom Terror
stats.description: TERROR ALERT! The infamous Mandrom has been discovered in Arrenius. Bring all your friends and help us to destroy it before everything is lost.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 20 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 20
stats.description: Admiral McArthur: “I got another mission for you in the meantime while our scientists investigates the Nexar Ships we found at the hangar. There is a planet located here in the first circle, make you way there and scan the surface.”
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Bring the data to the AF Research station located next to the Vorsran Warp Gate. While you were busy our scientist discovered a lot of useful information about Nexar Space Crafts, apparently they don’t have any life support systems. This means that the Nexar can survive at 3K and in the vacuum of space. Quite scary news… There are some good new as well, our engineers have figured out a way to add life support systems to Nexar Fighters. The downside is that the space consumed by the life support system weakens the vessels combat potential.

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 4
stats.description: Land on Vlardenon in Sarkinon and find the missing AF Agent that owes John a lot of money.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: "There is one more client that owes me money, but he is a nasty renegade fraud that laughed at me when I asked him to return my investment. Please don't reason with him!"

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 6
stats.description: Something happened to Jahaar While we were hunting the Stalkers. He is not linked to the net anymore. Rumors indicate that he was kidnapped by the Renegades and taken to Vetinari in the Venturi star system. We should investigate this...
stats.completeDescription: We discovered an abandoned Renegade outpost and inside we found the corpse of Jahaar and a few remaining notes from his interrogators. He told them everything… including what was on our data chip. The note hinted of the existence of a hidden research facility somewhere in the Antor sector. The note ends with a personal comment: “I guess this had to be done… after all we are the renegades, we who have forsaken everything in our quest for vengeance… forsaken everything including our humanity… we must succeed at any cost”.Perhaps we can find someone who knows more at the Crossfire Cantina located in the Arrenius star system.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 13 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 13
stats.description: Find the hidden station and inquire about any suspicious individuals…
stats.completeDescription: Black Market Merchant: “I might have seen someone like that, a little favour might refresh my memory. These bloody giant space moths keeps eating my supply vessels, most frustrating. Why would they even want to eat a metal ship? Take down a few and I will assist you in turn.”

stats.label: (timed): Kill [amount] Bionic Plankton! (65-0)
stats.title: Kill [amount] Bionic Plankton!
stats.description: That is right, you shall kill bionic plankton for the sake of the federation. And for the research and scientific progress it will boost.

stats.label: (PvP-6) Only the strongest (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-6) Only the strongest
stats.description: Only the strongest will be allowed to join the ranks of the elite Blood-Claw faction within the guild. Considering your progress this far ... I think you could make it. If you succeed in this, brand new opportunities will be waiting for you. Some of the strongest fighters hang out in Mitrillion now, go there and dominate them. Show them who's the new boss. Get 25 kills in a row without getting destroyed even once.

stats.label: (timed): Regius Exterminatore! (80-0)
stats.title: Regius Exterminatore!
stats.description: The latest weapon in the Nezerian arsenal have appeared in Fulzar. It's a new kind of dreadnought that also works as a carrier, armed with nukes. Destroy it and Fulzar will be a lot safer.

stats.label: (timed): Dire Fest (20-0)
stats.title: Dire Fest
stats.description: We want you to take down [amount] Dire Moths in the [h]Vibrilian System[/h]. Beware, they are usually not alone...

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 36 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 36
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Finally, we got one! Quick, let’s get out of here… before that giant ship comes after us.. head for the AFIS HQ in Arrenius.”
stats.description: Destroy an Aureus Judicator and kidnap the pilot!

stats.label: (timed): The Nexar Elite (100-0)
stats.title: The Nexar Elite
stats.description: The Nexar Elite is made up by the best fighters in the Nexar Fleet. The Vindicator type is piloted by the elite among the elite. This is capable both at short and long range. It’s better to bring several allies along for this one.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 38 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 38
stats.description: Operative Smith: “You survived??? That is at least some good news! It would have been a shame to lose such a useful tool. You better report everything to Admiral Cheng at the Warp Gate in Arrenius”
stats.completeDescription: Admiral Cheng: “Good work, at least we know that negotiation with the Aureus is not an option. We should strike them now, they are clearly underestimating us. Maybe we can deal a decisive strike before they know what hit them... We need to prepare a massive strike force, this naturally requires a vast amount of resources and everyone will have to pitch in… collect 8000 pieces of large metal scraps and bring them to the AF Recycle Station in Fulzar.”

stats.label: Test Mission Bionic Larva (0-0)
stats.title: Test Mission Bionic Larva
stats.description: Kill 1 enemy
stats.completeDescription: wooopido!

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 37 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 37
stats.description: Return to the AFIS HQ in Arrenius.
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “Let’s get on with this…”*The Aures Pilot has not made a single sound one the way here. It is wearing a full golden Body Armor.*Operative Smith: “Who are you? You better speak up… or I might have to get nasty” Dr. Mira: “Does it even know our language?”AF Agent: “You have one last chance… what do your people want with us?”Aures Pilot: “We Want You To Die.”Dr. Mira: “How can you know our language??”Aures Pilot: “The Languages Of Such Simple Life Forms Does Not Pose Much Of A Challenge.”AF Agent: “You better be careful scum… realise your situation!”Dr. Mira: “Why are you fighting everyone? If you are superior… shouldn’t you strive for galactic peace.”Aures Pilot: “You Are A Statistical Anomaly Which Must Be Corrected For. Your Only Useful Function Is Your Ability To Die.”Dr. Mira: “How rude...”Operative Smith: “I have had enough!”Aures Pilot: “My Brethren Have Arrived For Me.”*The Aures Pilot fades away leaving only a weak golden mirage in his place.*Operative Smith: “What a failure… hurry prepare for battle...”

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 1
stats.description: While doing some repairs on the ship we heard some local stories about the mechanical fortress close by. Recently the defenses around it has been increased and it now threatens this station. We should assist them in this fight.
stats.completeDescription: Captain! The lead engineer on the Upgrade Station wants to talk with us.

stats.label: (timed): Nexar Sniper Duel (90-0)
stats.title: Nexar Sniper Duel
stats.description: We have discovered a new type of Nexar spacecraft with lethal sniping capabilities. It's called the Projector and it's common for pilots to be killed unaware of their presence. Find them and try to fight in close range as their reload is slow and turning radius is mediocre.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 27 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 27
stats.description: Land on Zhersis in Vorsran… and let Xhargreg attempt to negotiating with the Nexar… can this possibly end well?
stats.completeDescription: Because of Xhargreg presence the Nexar didn’t open fire and you eventually managed to find a Nexar official of communicate with.*After a few minutes of Xhargreg and the Nexar standing in front of each other doing nothing… visible… the Nexar official suddenly turns very angry… and pulls a gun..*Xhargreg: “Now would be a good time to run! Hehehahahhehrhhg…”*You easily manage to escape the planet*Xhargreg: “Great news everyone! I successfully explained that AF intenteds to exterminate the Nexar as punishment for killing all those lovely bugs in Vorsran… Come see me once I have managed to set up a new research lab here in Vorsran… then we can continue with our plan!”Crew: “Oh no… this can’t be good”

stats.label: (timed): Recycle [amount] (8-0)
stats.title: Recycle [amount]
stats.description: Bring [amount] of Hydrogen Spill to the recycle station and recycle it please!

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 7
stats.description: Gather 88 Bug Legs.
stats.completeDescription: Bring the Bug Legs to Xhargreg in Zergelin.

stats.label: Another Dimension: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Another Dimension: Part 5
stats.description: Lieutenant Reiland: "We have found evidence that Abraham fled to a fanatic shelter on a solitary asteroid in the Hyperion system: x = 1200, y = 750"
stats.completeDescription: Fanatic Abraham: "I rather die than being prosecuted by you maggots."Lieutenant Reiland: "Abraham is trying to escape with his Chrono ship, hurry up and take him down before he leaves the system!"

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 20 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 20
stats.description: Gather 32 Hydrogen Oscillators.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 17 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 17
stats.description: Land on Roskur in Mitrilion and search for the Renegade Defector. Crew: “This planet seems to be very heavily defended! We may need some assistance here”
stats.completeDescription: Renegade Defector: “Who are you? How did you even find me here? I’m actually very impressed…  I’m living in a small container in the middle of giant forest on a heavily defended alien planet in the middle of the insect infested Gellan sector… I thought people would take a hint that I maybe didn’t want to be found. So what do you want? You want information about the Nezerians? Sure… I’ll come with you, since you are going to have to find me a new hiding place, the Renegades don’t take very kindly to defectors.”

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 15 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 15
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Interesting… they don’t show much teamwork. Next take out the an enemy strongholds. I expect you back within a few hours.”
stats.description: Engage in battle with 20 Nexar Skirmishers or Nexar Cluster Bombers.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 16 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 16
stats.description: Gather 64 Genetic Control Implants from the Bionic Queens in Fulzar
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Excellent… this will allow me to create a whole new generation of wasps! I have prepared a truly unique reward for you this time…”Crew: “I don’t like this… a truly unique reward can’t possibly be anything good when it comes from this guy…”

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 10
stats.description: Go to Xhargreg at the Abandoned Factory in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz!”Xhargreg: “Bzzzzz! bzzz?”Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz bzzz.”Crew: “What’s going on???”Xhargreg: “Great news everybody! All our wasp friends are safe!”*Two hours later*Xhargreg: “Oh, you want to know more about my species? Okok… they are called the Nexar… they live in Vorsran now… bla bla… they don’t like bugs… blabla.. they can travel through black holes… ***BORING!!!***Let’s change the subject to something a little more interesting… like ANTS!Hmmm.. got any advice on how to get ants?”

stats.label: (PvP-4) Demoralize the lawless (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-4) Demoralize the lawless
stats.description: It's time to show them our strength, kill 8 hostile player in a row without dying.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 26 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 26
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar with the Bug Legs!
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: “Great, just in time… I was afraid I wouldn’t have enough Bug Legs for my next experiment… the glorious 42 foot wasp! Hehehahahhrhhehhghhg… finally... that must be *it*...”*10 minutes later*Xhargreg: “Why are you still here? Oh? Fine… yes nexar doesn’t breather any gas… and we can easily survive in space… I had to make the fake voice box to speak with your weird species… nexar uses chemicals signals for communications… You want me to do what... harghegghhfghd… fine……… I’ll come with you to do this… negotiation... thing...”

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 4
stats.completeDescription: Wrengher Jones: “That’s a start at least. Thanks… I suppose. Very well? What do you want to know about Azuron? To be honest I don’t know very much, that battle was… just horrible, I used to be a Captain in the Azuron 3rd Fleet. I’m probably the only survivor from that unit. There was no warning, we had no clue where they came from, who they were or what they wanted. They opened fire before we even had time to try to open a communication channel. After a few seconds it was clear that we didn’t have a chance… we decided to abandon ship.. much good that did, they didn’t care about the intergalactic laws of war..  they used our escape pods... for target practise… I was to only one to survive. I don’t know if I could be called lucky… I drifted for over 2 years before I arrived in hyperion.”
stats.description: Take out 10 of the closest hostile battle stations and Wrengher Jones promised to tell you what he knows about Azuron.

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 2
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “Good job there. Let me introduce myself. My name is Jacob Kreiger, I’m with the Antor Federation, I’m a Lieutenant in the 2nd division of the main fleet. We are trying to keep the order in this region, but we can’t do much good these days. I’m going to give you 200 steel, you can use this to acquire a weapon. I suggest that you head over to the Antor Federation Armory.
stats.description: Lieutenant Kreiger promised to help us out if we can destroy 3 hostile space stations.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 1
stats.description: Operative Smith: “Ah there you are, we have been expecting your arrival to Arenius.... we have ‘obtained’ a copy of one report, which you ‘supposedly’ presented to a Lieutenant Kreiger… regarding the destruction of Azuron... yes… we are somewhat impressed with your fairly rapid progress… you could potentially be of some minor use to us.. if.. you are interested… that is… go to the AFIS HQ… it located southwest of the main system here in Arrenius...”
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “So you have decided to join our organisation? Good… welcome to the AFIS. We could definitely use more ‘competent’ agents. We have obtained several points of intel indicating that this new alien race have a major base of operations somewhere in the Gellan system. Your first task is to head over to the Gellan system and contact operative Smith for further information, he’s at the Warp Gate in Kritillian.“

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 8
stats.description: Land on Argenon in Cynapsian and kidnap a Nezerian soldier from an enemy fortress .
stats.completeDescription: Krux: “You are bzzzt lucky today, we found one outside when he was doing a bzrtzz, gagged and ready to be eaten!”Crew: “This doesn’t seem right...”Krux: “Sponge is the main purpose in life.. I tell you..bzz”

stats.label: (timed): Kill [amount] Spawners! (3-0)
stats.title: Kill [amount] Spawners!
stats.description: The enemies are assembled inside the spawners. Help up take down [amount] of them captain!

stats.label: The Swarm: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: The Swarm: Part 3
stats.description: Lieutenant Keryn:  "Kill the swarm Queen during the next invasion. This will hopefully make the insects confused and maybe delay the next swarm."
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Keryn: "The Queen died, but it made little difference except keeping the Arrenius system under control for another hour. However, we urge you to explore the Gellan sector to put an end to this."

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 27 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 27
stats.description: Return to AFIS HQ in Arrenius
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Excellent… how ever there seems to be a bit of an issue here…”Nezerian Scientist: “GHAARK!! Herath kraka zherphek!”Operative Smith: “Oh do shut up! We need to find someone to help us translate their language… I leave this up to you...”

stats.label: We are under attack!: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: We are under attack!: Part 1
stats.description: Operative Smith: We are under attack! Last week ships from an unidentified race appeared just outside of here. At first they didn’t attack us. But unfortunately some overeager adventures attacked them… Now they are back… and in force this time… it seems like this new species have declared war on us. They have somehow opened up a black hole right next to our base and enemies are streaming into the system. Please help defend New Erath from the coming onslaught! Countless lives depend upon you!
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: Excellent work there! You’re getting quite proficient at this killing business... However, it doesn't seem to be enough to stop them. Their ranks are refilling too quickly. We have identified an enemy commander, whom we believe is in charge of the invading force. Take him out and maybe they will pull back...

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Macrophages! (12-0)
stats.title: Kill the Macrophages!
stats.description: A new species has been sighted in Zergilin. To test the quality of our weapons we should try to kill [amount] of them.

stats.label: (timed): Suicide Mission (16-0)
stats.title: Suicide Mission
stats.description: There is a new suicide bug that has plauged the Mitrillion system. Investigate and kill [amount] of them.

stats.label: (PvP-5) A new hunting ground (0-0)
stats.title: (PvP-5) A new hunting ground
stats.description: Good job, congratulations on your new rank in the guild! Following the recent discovery of Kritillian, a new lawless hunting ground have open for us. This new system seems to be very rich in irridium, a very sought after resource. Go there and take out 50 targets and loot 'em dry of their precious irridium.

stats.label: (timed): The Nexar Elite (100-0)
stats.title: The Nexar Elite
stats.description: The Nexar Elite is made up by the best fighters in the Nexar Fleet. The Phaser type specializes at killing from a medium distance, its powerful Phaser Beam nullifing your energy resistances, avoid taking damages from any other sources while targeted by their Phasers.

stats.label: The Warp Gate (4-0)
stats.title: The Warp Gate
stats.description: Captain, it time you learn how to warp. You can get a warp pass to another system and fast travel at the Warp Gate. Press [h]'M'[/h] to locate it on the map and go visit them. (If you are already in Kapello, just warp back to [h]Hyperion[/h] and land on the warp gate)

stats.label: Reach Level 6 (6-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 6
stats.description: We see some rare raw talent in you, Captain. But, can you harness your skills and use them in the correct way? We are not sure ... Prove it by reaching level 6, there is a nice reward containing [h]Hydrogen Crystals[/h] waiting for you!

stats.label: Weapons Cartel: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Weapons Cartel: Part 2
stats.description: AF Transmission: "We have another fortified position in Kapello that we need to take care of. We need you to destroy 10 elite guardians. Beware of the turret Nova, it will destroy any missiles you fire at them."
stats.completeDescription: AF Transmission: "You have once again proven your skills as a captain. I think its time to move on and do us a real favour. We have located the weapon cartel and need you to take action."

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 21 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 21
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”I’m sure that I can reverse engineer how their teleport devices works from this… yes…”Crew: “Really?? That’s actually truly impressive.. for once..  “Xhargreg: ”The Wasps keeps bring back piles of those glowing things… please just take some of them… before I’m out of space for my highly important scientific research...“Crew: “More artifacts! I don’t know if this is even more impressive… Thanks?”Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: “Bzz! Thank! bzzz... You! Bzz..”Crew: “Errr… what’s happening here?”

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 11 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 11
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Welcome back… I hope you were successful? Now… erhm… let’s use the Genetic Control Chip to modify the Wasps toxin to mimic the renegade one you collected..”*10 hours later*Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “BzzZzzZzzzzZzz!!”*It looks happy…*Xhargreg: ”Success!!! Hahahahehahgrhegtrghh… You have been of great assistance to the wasps of this world! What more could you wish for in life???”Crew: “Perhaps… a reward?”Xhargreg: ”Next we have to deal with the Nezerians corrosive resistance… this is more tricky… the toxins of the Bionic Deamons could be useful… go gather some… or… a lot… like 8*8!”

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Triguns! (6-0)
stats.title: Kill the Triguns!
stats.description: [player], the Triguns around Ronduria in Durian keep shooting down our allies. Please take [amount] of them down.

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Triads! (9-0)
stats.title: Kill the Triads!
stats.description: The Triads are a pain with their heavy plasma blast. They are killing our allies and we need you to take them down ASAP. Are you up for it?

stats.label: The Twins: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The Twins: Part 1
stats.description: Please help us, our twin ship was not able to drop out of warp and got lost in the outskirts of this solar system. We obtained these coordinates from there last distress call. It should be close to the Elite zone.Please open the map (M) and head to these coordinates:  x = -203, y = -414
stats.completeDescription: The crew of the twin ship seems to gone. A few people on the station recall a vessel was salvaged just a few days ago. But they say there were no survivors. We should head back to Endarion and tell them the bad news.

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Zappers (6-0)
stats.title: Kill the Zappers
stats.description: [player], the Zappers around Kantalla in Durian keep shooting down innocent space travellers. Please take [amount] of them down.

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 2
stats.description: Kill [amount] Electro Blobs to impress the neolitic tribe on Amadun.
stats.completeDescription: Priest: “Hail the new god! A sign appeared on the sky again and an army of blobs were slayed. May he be worshipped in eternity and prepare the fiest of a thousand souls!”

stats.label: Stolen Technology: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Stolen Technology: Part 1
stats.description: Captain, we just recieved information about a raid against the Fanatic stronghold on Arborea. We should investigate who is behind this attack. Maybe they can become our allies?
stats.completeDescription: We don't know who it was, but they seem to have stolen some sort of valuable technology from the Fanatics. And they left a warp trail leading to Hozar.

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 7
stats.description: It looks like the insects have been assimilated by something and the bio energy readings seem to indicate that the source is located in Neurona. Head to the Upgrade Station in Neurona and find out what it is.
stats.completeDescription: Finally, we are close enough to read out the bio energy signature. Ono calls it the Motherbrain and it seem to be partially biological and part Nezerian technology. This might be one of their sick experiments and maybe the cause of the chaos in the sector.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 15 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 15
stats.description: Rendezvous with Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Mitrilion.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Ok... well done… getting to this miserable system… it’s completely overrun by insects… especially those suicidal explosive moths… who even came up with that idea...? anyway… enough about the local fauna... let’s split up and cover all the planets.. I head west… you head east… start with Armoji and Orgasin...”

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 6
stats.description: Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with your findings.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Why did you wake me up??? Oh, excellent, this is much more interesting.. But still not good enough. While you were slacking off killing those 888 ice-moths I did some real work and discovered that there are some extremely toxic Macrophages around the planet Pouleno. Go there and play with them a bit, won’t ya? Hehe…"

stats.label: (PvP-3) More targets (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-3) More targets
stats.description: Good job clearing those bounties! There seems to be an endless supply of people that think they can do whatever they want. It's time to go for the stronger targets. Go for any hostile players. Aim for the stronger ones this time, your target must be at least level 6.

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 1
stats.description: We have recieved a distress call from the planet Sinensis here in Mitrillion. Please investigate and rescue any survivors.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: ”Ahh… finally. Thank you for helping me good Sir, I’m a John, John McClain, a pioneer in planetary excavations. Yes, I have already filled your ship to the brim with tools needed for this expidition. Haven’t you heard about the new system Fulzar, the legend says its a golden paradise, with planets made of solid gold! But no time for small talk, I have been waiting for this opportunity for years now.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 42 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 42
stats.description: Join the assault and destroy the Aureus Executor!
stats.completeDescription: Admiral Ymer: “I can’t believe it! You did it! You are a true hero! Although our losses where heavy, this is great news! We have finally been able to deal a real blow to them! Maybe the settlers of New Erath can finally feel safe.”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 39 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 39
stats.description: Collect 8000 pieces of Big Metal Scraps for the war effort!
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Nguyen: “Take this reward as a token of appreciation for your assistance. Bring it to the resources to the recycle station in Fulzar.”

stats.label: (timed): Fulzar Strongholds (100-0)
stats.title: Fulzar Strongholds
stats.description: Captain, the enemy is getting complacent. We cannot let them rebuild! Strike them where they will least expect it.. attack Anjio and then Mazim! You will be rewarded greatly.

stats.label: Exploration (2-0)
stats.title: Exploration
stats.description: Captain, we are gathering intelligence from all planets in the galaxy. You can take down a planet's defensive shield by destroying the spawners orbiting the planet. Then you may safely land and send down your teams.

stats.label: (timed): Infested Fanatics! (32-0)
stats.title: Infested Fanatics!
stats.description: Fanatics has always been a huge problem but now they are insane. They have been infested by an alien life form and is now roaming around in Sarkinon. Kill [amount] of them for us.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 15 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 15
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Most facinating… I can’t wait to see the result of this experiment… Hehehehahahrgegeg… Whe wasps brought back another useless pile of glowing junk while you were gone… feel free to grab it.. I wonder why they do that anyway…”Crew: “More artifacts! Finally something useful!”Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzzzz…?”Xhargreg: ”I seem to have run out of Genetic Control Implants… I need you to fetch a few more…”

stats.label: (timed): Health Care! (23-0)
stats.title: Health Care!
stats.description: This is urgent, we need you to find and kill [amount] Repair Probes in Mitrillion. We have been told they can heal enemy ships, so try to isolate and take them out.

stats.label: (PvP-2) Law and order (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-2) Law and order
stats.description: This Captain Mark C Tain from the Galactic Patrol. We've noticed your handy work, and approve of your methods. There has been a lot of unrest in the Antor System, innocent space explorers getting shot at for no reason. We've decided to issue a large bounty on the stronger hostile players in this sector. Take down 10 pirates above level 3, we don't care who you target as long as they are a threat to the peace. And remember... we don't show any mercy to pirate scum!

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 2
stats.description: Land on upgrade station and talk to Osho, the lead engineer.
stats.completeDescription: Osho could not thank us enough and told us that he is experimenting on a new weapon that will help them in their defense and he wants to share this technology with us. But they need some expert help in bio energy readings and asked if we can take some readings and travel to Ono, in the Kritillian sector. She have the knowledge to finish their new weapon.

stats.label: Junk is valuable (2-0)
stats.title: Junk is valuable
stats.description: When enemy ships are destroyed, the wreckage is left in space for other space travellers to pick up. This junk can be recycled into valuable resources. Captain, we need you to collect 20 units of scrap metal!

stats.label: (timed): Polueno Mission (16-0)
stats.title: Polueno Mission
stats.description: Go visit the planet Polueno and collect nesting data for future research on the Macrofag neural system. They are very tough and incredibly resilient.

stats.label: Upgrades (2-0)
stats.title: Upgrades
stats.description: Captain, we have allied upgrade stations placed around the galaxy. Press [h]'M'[/h] to locate the station in this system and go pay them a visit.

stats.label: The Twins: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: The Twins: Part 2
stats.description: Head back to Endarion and tell them the bad news about their twin ship.
stats.completeDescription: The settlers were very sad to lose their family and friends. But despite the dispair they seem to have found strength and promised each other to work hard to honour their beloved dead.

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 10
stats.description: For fun and possibly a few artifacts, land on Glictan and kidnap a renegade spy!
stats.completeDescription: Crew: “You really are crazy about those artifacts. But I guess the renegades deserve it after all..”

stats.label: (timed): Massacre 3! (30-0)
stats.title: Massacre 3!
stats.description: Kill [amount] enemies of any kind. This one is really difficult so you need to be fast to beat it!

stats.label: (timed): DMAT Fighting! (35-0)
stats.title: DMAT Fighting!
stats.description: We have located a new type of fighter in Kritillian. It has a very strong armor and uses a new type of laser weapon. Kill 3 of them and see what you can find out about their weapon.

stats.label: (timed): Kill Blood Plankton! (20-0)
stats.title: Kill Blood Plankton!
stats.description: The regular plankton creatures have evolved and are more deadly than ever. Kill [amount] and recieve a reward.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 12 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 12
stats.description: Go and *borrow* some bioengineering equipment from a Nezerian Battle Ship in Sarkinon.

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Spawners! (9-0)
stats.title: Kill the Spawners!
stats.description: The enemies are assembled inside the spawners. Help up take down [amount] of them captain!

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 28 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 28
stats.description: Crew: “Maybe we should locate Dr. Mira? She was able to translate the Nezerians logs last time.”Look for Dr. Mira at the Anchorhead Cantina in Durian.
stats.completeDescription: Bar Keeper: “Yeah, I remember her, she sure could handle her liquor. But she is not here any longer… she said something about a giant space brain… in some place called… what was it again.. oh right Neurona… if that’s even a real place”Nezerian Scientist: “Uhay nuur bar!”Bar Keeper: “Err… what? Who’s that guy?”Nezerian Scientist: “GHAARK!!!”Bar Keeper: “Ghaark to you too…. now either order something or… GET… LOST!"

stats.label: The Cult: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: The Cult: Part 6
stats.description: Jane: “Looks like we are in trouble, meet me at Melenda in Arrenius, also, I have someone else here that you might have a score to settle with.”
stats.completeDescription: Jane: “I knew I couldn't trust him so I waited for him at the warp gate while you recycled the engine parts. Then we had a serious talk and he confessed he is part of the Cult. According to the data the cult are experimenting on black holes and they are recruiting a small army of fanatics. My brother has been recruited as a fanatic purifier, they are know to attack and assassinate heretics in this system, I need to stop him”Cultist: “Hahahaha… It’s to late to save your brother and we knew you would fall for this trap, the planet has been surrounded by fanatics and now you will die, heretic!”

stats.label: The Cult: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: The Cult: Part 1
stats.description: We seem to have found a hitlist on a dead corpse. The only name that is not crossed over is Jane Hansen, according to the notes she is supposed to be a frequent drinker at the Anchorhead Cantina in Durian.
stats.completeDescription: Jane: “Who the hell are you? I'm not even close to being attracted to you, nor the right spieces.. so you're just here for a beer? Yeaaahhh... right... thats the worst lie I've heard today, and thats not saying a little...I bet those damn cult people sent you here to shut me up.. yes, they don't like me, they weren't that fond of my attempt to save my brother. Do you know what they do? You have never heard of them? Thats precisely what one of them would say.. but I actually need some help and I've the perfect mission for you, to prove you're not one of them, infiltrate their settlement and find a certain data chip... what I need it for? Thats not really your business, is it?”

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 4
stats.description: Operative Smith: “The next mark is Captain Xhargrefh. This is going to be a lot more difficult. Captain Xhargref pilots an Elite Class Phaser vessel. The phaser is capable of completely negating energy resistances with it’s powerful Phaser beam weapon. The mark seems to prefer hit and run type of attacks. You might want to clear out any back up in the area before engaging this target. Captain Xhargrefh was last observed commanding the defences at the entrance to the third circle.”
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Unbelievable! You definitely earned the reward!”

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 7
stats.description: We discovered some remaining notes hinting that the Renegades left for a hidden research facility somewhere in the Antor system.Perhaps we can find someone who knows more at the Crossfire Cantina in Arrenius
stats.completeDescription: A suspicious looking insectoid lurking in a corner offered to sell us the coordinates of this secret renegade base. It requested that we scout a few planets and mark the locations of any valuable resources.Do you really think we can trust it?

stats.label: (timed): Assassination Plot (110-0)
stats.title: Assasination Plot
stats.description: The Nexar replace their admirals as fast as we can get people to kill them, see if you can throw them into confusion by taking out a few at once.

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 5
stats.description: We just received an emergency distress call from Jahaar on Centurion. Something has happened, we should return as fast as possible.
stats.completeDescription: Something happened to Jahaar While we were hunting the Stalkers. He is not linked to the net anymore. Rumors say he was kidnapped by the Renegades and taken to Vetinari in the Venturi star system. We should investigate this...

stats.label: (timed): Livin' Through Chemistry (10-0)
stats.title: Livin' Through Chemistry
stats.description: Toxic waste is a precious product that can be recycled into plasma fluids, collect [amount] of those and you will receive a great reward.
