stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 12 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 12
stats.description: Find your way into Vorsran.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Excellent finally some progress! But… look at that thing they have constructed in here… their defences are truly impressive. Breaking through their defences is not going to be easy. Contact Admiral McArthur, at the Research Station here in Vorsran.”

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 9
stats.description: Bring John McClain to the surface of Lak so he can start the excavation.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: “Thank you again! I will start excavating the surface and then go deeper into the core. My expedition crew are already set and if you want to explore some yourself, feel free to do so. Here is your final reward.”

stats.label: (timed): The Nexar Elite (100-0)
stats.title: The Nexar Elite
stats.description: The Nexar Elite is made up by the best fighters in the Nexar Fleet. The Edge type are fitted with a Heave Wave Generator, a dreadful siege weapon. They prefer to hide behind Nexar ships. So, make sure you clear out all support before engaging one of these.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 10
stats.description: Go to Vibrilian and kill 8 Deamons, be careful they can be a bit nasty

stats.label: (timed): Mission Impossible I (16-0)
stats.title: Mission Impossible I
stats.description: There are Elite Gunners guarding the planet [h]Graven[/h] in the Arrenius system. Kill [amount] of them for us. Also, there is a rumour that some of them can drop the gatling gun.

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 6
stats.description: Get up close and kill the Queen in the center of the Zergilin solar system and then let Ono do her research on the carcass.
stats.completeDescription: Captain, we have disturbing news, Ono has found out that the Queen is not responsible for its own actions, it is being mind controlled by something else. The energy readings from the Queen and the mechanical nano robots found inside the carcass indicates that something very unnatural is going on.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 31 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 31
stats.description: Report to Admiral Cheng in Arrenius.
stats.completeDescription: Admiral Cheng: “This is terrible news and the timing couldn’t be much worse… except, I wonder who the golden ones are? Something even the Nezerians dread… That’s not a good sign. We have just launched a venture into Fulzar, in an attempt to find more habitable planets. I fear for the expeditions safety. Go to Fulzar! You must make haste… Contact Admiral Ymer in Fulzar. I will dispatch assistance as soon as possible.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 14 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 14
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Hmm…. that took longer than I expected… Maybe your reputation was a bit exaggerated? Anyway.. we got a lot of work to do here. The key to victory in any war is knowledge about the opponent. How do they operate? What are their strong points? Weak points? Habits?  Engage a couple of Skirmishers and Cluster bombers, and we’ll observe their behaviour from here.
stats.description: Destroy 75 Nexar Stealth Bombers in Vorsran.

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 4
stats.completeDescription: According to Ono's latest research she has discovered that the Macrophagse are a vital part of the infestation. She wants to study them up close and she insists that we take her to Polueno in the Zergilin system.
stats.description: Kill 100 moths to decrease the infestation rate and help Ono in her research. She believes  something evil is behind the spread of the infestation and she wants to find out what it is.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 8
stats.description: Bring the Bug Legs to Xhargreg in Zergelin.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Why hello there! Look at all those Bug Leg! That’s the best gift anyone could ever wish for!!! Oh? You want my help? .. wait.. what have you got there? Eeep! Oh.. phew… it’s dead… It’s been a long long time since I saw another one of my species.. although not long enough.. hahahharghga....”*Xhargreg pokes the corpse with a bug leg*Xhargreg: ”You say they have appeared in Fulzar? That’s terrible news! *Sob* All our poor bug friends are in danger now! I must check on my poor wasp!*Xhargreg rushes off*Report back to Operative Smith in Fulzar.

stats.label: (PvP-3) Too easy... (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-3) Too easy...
stats.description: Haha, that was nothing! Anyone could have done those weaklings in. If you want to get anywhere in this guild you better show that you're strong ... for real. Get 10 kills in a row without dying. If you can do that ... you may be worth a little respect ... However ... I bet you 2500 units of steel you'll never ever make it!

stats.label: Recycle Station (2-0)
stats.title: Recycle Station
stats.description: Good work picking up all that junk, Captain!Now, bring those 20 units of scrap metal to the recycle station and turn it into valuable minerals.

stats.label: (timed): Thorn Ambush III (20-0)
stats.title: Thorn Ambush III
stats.description: This time the Jagged Star has evolved and is more sinister, hostile and vicious than before. Kill [amount] of them and we will reward you greatly.

stats.label: (timed): Elite Stalker takedown (6-0)
stats.title: Elite Stalker takedown
stats.description: Captain, we need your help to take down 3 elite Stalkers in the elite area far north in Hyperion. Hurry!

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 16 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 16
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Those things are much tougher than they look. I wonder how so many of those large ships fits in there? Perhaps they contain some kind of teleportation devices or maybe even void portals?”
stats.description: Destroy a Nexar Strongholds in Vorsran.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 4
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Well done… very useful… they appear to shut down any hatching activity while taking damage… while useful knowledge... these structures are not the source they are merely incubators… the source must be elsewhere… if they are like their smaller counterparts back on Erath… maybe they have a queen… find and kill it… locating it might prove quite a challenge.. a good test of your resourcefulness”
stats.description: Destroy 25 flower like structures orbiting planets in the Kritillian system.

stats.label: (timed): The Flame Trail (20-0)
stats.title: The Flame Trail
stats.description: We are researching a new weapon and we need to kill [amount] of these to improve our research. Maybe one day it will be complete...

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 24 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 24
stats.description: Assess the Nezerians combat potential, take down three Cruisers.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Very heavily armored… long range gatling gun… good weapons and armor… good quality equipment… but still… nothing exceptionally high tech...”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 34 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 34
stats.description: Destroy an Aureus Warrior or Monachus and kidnap the pilot!
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “What do you mean empty? No pilot? A drone ship? That’s too bad… guess we have to look to the bigger classes if we want to find a manned vessel… maybe an Aureus Sidus will do...”

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 19 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 19
stats.description: Go investigate the Aureus Teleport Technology.. kill a total of 256 Aureus Warriors and Aureus Monachus.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Good… I have managed to record the energy signature of their teleport devices...I will need some of those Hydrogen Oscillators”

stats.label: Mission Reach Level 12 (0-0)
stats.title: Mission Reach Level 12
stats.description: no text yet

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 18 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 18
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “I have deviced a plan, AF have recently finished developing a mobile Safe Zone generator. Your first task is to take one and use it capture the Nexar Hangar in the first circle. The Safe Zone can be deployed after all the Nexar forces around the hangar have been defeated. The Safe Zone will go down if left unattended for more than 20 minutes, allowing the Nexar to recapture the hangar.”
stats.description: Engage and destroy 15 Nexar Ships. The valid targets are the Nexar Tank, the Nexar Fighter and the Nexar Projector.

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 6
stats.description: Operative Smith: “My agents have just identified the next target; Rear Admiral Vorghis. He commands an upgraded version of the Nexar Blade vessel. Our scouts reports that Admiral Vorghis vessel have greatly improved harden shields, leaving only a few seconds during which the ship is vulnerable. Vorghis was last seen patrolling the 4th circle.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “That’s great news Captain! Rear Admiral Vorghis is no more! This should severely disrupt their defensive capabilities. You have truly earned the bounty. Ready for next mark?“

stats.label: (timed): Nezerian Dreadnoughts! (82-0)
stats.title: Nezerian Dreadnoughts!
stats.description: We have a serious threat incoming in the Sarkinon system. Please assist the AF Agents and destroy at least 1 Dreadnought. And don't try to solo it, it won't work.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 12 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 12
stats.description: Go to Hozar and search for the Renegade Defector. *Hint: Investigate all planets*
stats.completeDescription: Crew Member: There’s no sign of the Renegade Defector anywhere… maybe there’s a hidden station somewhere?

stats.label: (PvP-6) A new opportunity (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-6) A new opportunity
stats.description: Mitrillion has become infested with pirates looking to prove themselves. It's time to show your strength. Go there and ruin their attempts at so-called glory.Kill 20 pirates in a row without getting your ship destroyed even once. If you can manage that we'll let you join our elite squad, the Silver Wing! As a member of this squad you'll be allowed access to some of our newly developed tech.

stats.label: (timed): Nezerian Bloody Cruise! (39-0)
stats.title: Nezerian Bloody Cruise!
stats.description: Kill [amount] Nezerian battlecruisers and earn your reward. They use gatling guns, so prepare your armor.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 9
stats.description: AF Agent: “This will take a while… so in the meantime… go gather 250 units of Hyrdogen Spill… because we need it… for something… which is of course… a secret… so just get to it… and don’t bother asking any questions...”
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “Ok… thanks…”

stats.label: (timed): Ice Breaker II (16-0)
stats.title: Ice Breaker II
stats.description: We need more research data on these creatures. Please kill and collect [amount] more samples, and please try to keep the damage to a minimum.

stats.label: Weapons Cartel: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Weapons Cartel: Part 1
stats.description: AFTransmission: "Good day captain! We have a new mission for you, we need you to take out a few Elite Triads and Elite Stalkers for us to cripple the enemy stronghold in Hyperion."
stats.completeDescription: AF Transmission: "Good work captain! This area will not threat us for a while. We will send you another missions soon. However, we still need to find out how they aquire all the weapons."

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 17 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 17
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “That wasn’t too bad.. actually. Next it’s time to test the capability of the Nexar units stationed inside the first circle. Engage and take out 15 of them. The valid targets are Nexar Tank, Nexar Fighter and Nexar Projector.“
stats.description: Admiral McArthur: “Their defences does indeed look impressive. A five layered onion.. each layer protected by a force field barrier. Each force field does only have one entrance and it’s very heavily defended by bases sporting those nasty Heavy Weave Generators. Let’s try to break through the front gate. Start by taking out the 5 bases closes to the entrance.

stats.label: (timed): Nexar Blade (90-0)
stats.title: Nexar Blade
stats.description: The federation has received multiple reports about a fast and lethal assassin class ship. It doesn’t have stealth but is equipped with a powerful shield barrier, very similar to our own hardened shield ability. Be careful when you approach this vessel and make sure you keep it at a distance.

stats.label: (timed): Chelonidron Horror (26-0)
stats.title: Chelonidron Horror
stats.description: We have discovered a colossal exoskeletal creature in the Vibrilian system. It is a fire breathing menace and needs to be eradicated. Please kill it!

stats.label: The Cult: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: The Cult: Part 2
stats.description: If we trust her, infiltrate the seemingly peaceful settlement on Endarion and steal the data chip.
stats.completeDescription: Captain, the mission was easy and we have successfully stolen the data chip. Maybe too easy if you ask me, we should look out for ambush attempts on our way back.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 3
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”Let’s make the perfect poison! I’m sure you don’t have anything better to do anyway.The bigger moths are bound to have more potent poisons, right? Perfect logic! I remember seeing large moths in Hozar. Go there and kill 8 Moth Alphas. Why 8 you say?  Well 8 is a perfectly symmetrical number, therefore it’s the ideal choice."

stats.label: (timed): Data Recycle! (8-0)
stats.title: Data Recycle!
stats.description: You need to recycle simple data chips for us. We will analyze the breakdown for further research.

stats.label: (PvP-4) Gaining Ranks (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-4) Gaining Ranks
stats.description: I'm impressed that you actually succeeded ...Well then, to reach a new rank within our guild you have to improve your reputation. You can do it by any means you see fit ... Come back again when you reach 500 reputation and you'll recieve an increased share of our takings. Just a note ... we're working on developing a new raiding weapon, if you continue to prove yourself worthy you might even get to try it sometime in the future.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 2
stats.description: Meet Operative Smith at the Warp Gate in Kritillian.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Take a quick look around the most proximate area.. assess the strength of the hostiles… go…  be useful”

stats.label: (timed): Pickup [amount] Bionic Implant! (68-0)
stats.title: Pickup [amount] Bionic Implant!
stats.description: Pickup [amount] Bionic Implant, we need to look at them to discover the secret behind the bionic system. We might discover how to make bionic ourself if we are lucky.

stats.label: (timed): Enemy Takedown [amount] (4-0)
stats.title: Enemy Takedown [amount]
stats.description: Captain, the enemy numbers are growing! We need your help to gain control over the galaxy. Take down [amount] enemies of any kind, and you will receive a nice reward.

stats.label: (timed): Queen Hideout (15-0)
stats.title: Queen Hideout
stats.description: A moth queen has been discovered in the center of the Zergilin system and needs to be exterminated immediately.

stats.label: (timed): The Nexar Elite (100-0)
stats.title: The Nexar Elite
stats.description: The Nexar Elite is made up by the best fighters in the Nexar Fleet. The Blade type is specialized for close combat, and can handle tons of damage. The Blade type is equipped with a Kinetic Phase Blade, the damage of this weapon increases quickly over time. Try to avoid staying in range for a long time, and be prepared for a long battle.

stats.label: (timed): Zlatte takedown (5-0)
stats.title: Zlatte takedown
stats.description: These small buggers are giving us trouble ... they are not much one by one, but when they group together they are hard to deal with.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 15 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 15
stats.description: Return to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin with the Macrophage samples.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Look at this! Just what was missing… I’ll get on with creating the ultimate toxin… I came up with an excellent name for the weapon… the Death Cloud! You know… a cloud… that makes things die? Erhhm...  Death… Cloud...? You get it? While I work on the Death Cloud… could you do me a small favour? Go kill the Dread Moths in Cynapsian. Maybe... about… ALL of them... should be enough… Did I mention I hate those bloody exploding moths? Always killing my poor poor scout drones”

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 3
stats.description: Gather 512 bug legs from any of the larger moths.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Great work there… ehrm.. this must be your greatest achievement ever! Head back over here at once with the bug legs.”

stats.label: (timed): Melifon Research (14-0)
stats.title: Melifon Research
stats.description: In the Hozar system there is a research team that needs assistance. Land on the planet to help them. The planet is surrounded by a locust swarm, so get your Nova ready.

stats.label: (timed): Paper Cuts (11-0)
stats.title: Paper Cuts
stats.description: These giant blade organisms in Hozar are incredibly vicious. Kill [amount] of them and we will reward you.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 16 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 16
stats.description: Search for the Renegade Defector on Armoji and Orgasin in Mitrilion.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Nothing? I didn’t find anything in the west portion of the system… I was afraid of this… there are only two areas left... I’ll continue to the west… you’ll continue to the east and investigate the planet Roskur.. you may need some assistance this time… it looks really nasty on the scanners…”

stats.label: (timed): Pickup [amount] Polyhedric Fabric. (68-0)
stats.title: Pickup [amount] Polyhedric Fabric.
stats.description: Pickup [amount] Polyhedric Fabric. We will need to analyze the fragments to develop better armor in the federation.

stats.label: (timed): The Golden Star! (90-0)
stats.title: The Golden Star!
stats.description: The sidus, is a star shaped death machine capable of both melee and lightning damage. Watch out for its teleport ability.

stats.label: Reach Level 15 (15-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 15
stats.description: We like what we see, Captain, you show great potential! To prove you are not just another show off, please show us your dedication by reaching level 15.

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 10
stats.description: Return with the materials to Mark on Ronduria.
stats.completeDescription: Mark: “Awesome, finally enough junk to patch my ride back together. What do ya wanna know?  Ye, I know about that battle ship.. people around here now call it the ‘Dominator’… it looked like it was already badly damaged, so I figured it wouldn’t put up much of a fight… but hell.. was I wrong… I barely got away with my life.. luckily it’s engines were so badly damaged that it couldn’t move very fast.”

stats.label: (timed): Transport help needed (3-0)
stats.title: Transport help needed
stats.description: A research lab on [location1] needs to transport some rare alien specimens to the bigger research station at [location2].Help out with the transport and collect a fine reward!

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 35 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 35
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “What the??? It can split? And it’s also unmanned? Actually it’s not that much of a surprise… a pilot couldn’t survive that spinning... anyway it would be a shame to give up now… keep looking… next… go for an Aureus Judicator...“
stats.description: Destroy an Aureus Sidus and kidnap the pilot!

stats.label: (timed): Bug Legs! (15-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs!
stats.description: An anonymous mad man has orderd a batch of bug legs. Collect them and get a fine reward.

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 6
stats.description: Travel to New Erath in Fulzar and let John McClain see the new world with his own eyes.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: “Wow… this is really amazing! It was true, there are planets made of gold here, but unfortunately they are also guarded by a highly technological race. However, their small fighters seem to be made of some unknown material, if you destroy them I can detect and salvage some of it.”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 23 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 23
stats.description: Assess the Nezerians combat potential, take down 15 fighters.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Agile, and armed with high power plasters… luckily they are lacking in armor and shields… lets continue with the heavier ships…”

stats.label: (timed): The Judgement Day! (80-0)
stats.title: The Judgement Day!
stats.description: The Judge, or judicator, is a terrifying enemy that will melt anything with its beam. It also have photonic fighters that will crush any resistance. Destroy it if you can.

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 6
stats.description: Visit the great priest and use your omnipotence to convince him to sacrifice his ancient tribal artifacts.
stats.completeDescription: Crew: “I think we should keep this little episode to our self when we report back to the foundation. We have to explain why the population has been decimated to one!“

stats.label: The New Frontier: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: The New Frontier: Part 2
stats.description: Travel to New Erath in Fulzar and catch up on the current situation in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Admiral Ymer: “Welcome Captain, as you can see we are trying to colonize and defend new Erath from both the Aureus and Nezerians. Things have not gone well so far and we are greatly under powered. However, right now they seem to be busy fighting each other and less concerned about us. This is our chance to secure New Erath and become a permanent power in this sector. Talk to Lieutentant Nguyen and he will brief you about the current situation.”

stats.label: The Sacrifice: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: The Sacrifice: Part 4
stats.description: Kill [amount] Blood Macrophages to convince the priest even more.
stats.completeDescription: Priest: “Alas! The god is forgiving, he refuses more than a tenth of our usual sacrifice to show his kindness to the people. Prepare the small harvest of a hundred souls!”

stats.label: (PvP) To kill someone (6-0)
stats.title: (PvP) Your first player kill
stats.description: Shoot down another player!You can turn hostile by clicking on the "Skull icon" in the middle of the main UI bar. This can only be done inside a "Safe-Zone" in all systems as long as your level is not too high.

stats.label: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 5
stats.description: Operative Smith: “The next link in their chain of command is Commodore Herivis. He is in a Nexar Edge class ship. He managed to take out the whole scouting squadron with a single shot. It appears as if they finally have managed to mount of version of the Heavy Weave generator, the type that those nasty space station turrets are sporting, on a mobile vessel. The damage output of this craft is insane, whatever you do, do not get hit. Even if you use harden shields against it, your defences will be severely weakened for a long time. Herivis was last seen the entrance to the 4th circle.”
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Amazing work there Captain!"

stats.label: Eternal Mission (100-0)
stats.title: Eternal Mission
stats.description: You have reached the end and are now a true Astroflux space pioneer. You are truly awesome. But the Astroflux universe is always expanding. Stay tuned for more!

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Beamers (9-0)
stats.title: Kill the Beamers
stats.description: The Beamers are slow but have a powerful energy beam that gets more powerful when the target is locked for some time. Help us take them out!

stats.label: (timed): Blade Swarm (14-0)
stats.title: Blade Swarm
stats.description: Thorn Blades have been spotted in Kritillian, find them and exterminate them.

stats.label: (timed): Data Collection 3! (30-0)
stats.title: Data Collection 3!
stats.description: We are in urgent need of an advanced data chip. Please pick up a new one so we can analyze it.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 5
stats.description: Find and kill an insectoid queen somewhere in the Gellan Sector.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “You are indeed quite skilled… not a wasted of time… make haste… return to the Warp Gate in Kritillian… I have uncovered some potentially valuable intel.”

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 8
stats.description: A blackmarket transporter called “Mark” recently had a run in with a mysterious battle ship. He’s currently trying to get his ship repaired at Ronduria, let’s head over there and find out what he knows.
stats.completeDescription: Mark: “Oh great… yet another bounty hunter.. don’t move an inch or I’ll blast you full of holes!You’re not here for my bounty? Ok… I guess I’ll take your word for it.. I hate to admit it, but I’m not in a great situation here.. with my ride in pieces… I won’t be able to leave this heap of junk for at least another month. So what do ya want?Ok, I’ll help ya out if you can get me the parts I need to get my ride going again. Grab 250 scrap metal, 50 barrels of hydrogen spill and some duct tape of course. That should do the trick…”

stats.label: (timed): Assault the Executor (110-0)
stats.title: Assault the Executor
stats.description: The Aureus seem to rebuild their motherships at extreme speeds...it's a marvel that they can still function as an army. Defeat the Executor, kill off their high command and see if that cripples them.

stats.label: (timed): Nezerian Takedown (40-0)
stats.title: Nezerian Takedown
stats.description: Sarkinon is dominated by a Nezerian fleet, we need to take down [amount] battleships to prevent them from taking over the sector.

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 6
stats.description: Drop Dr. Mira off at the Anchorhead Cantina in Durian.
stats.completeDescription: Dr. Mira: “I’ll ask around here, haha, don’t worry about me.. I can take care of myself if needed. In the meantime, find out the strength of the hostiles in the vicinity.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 28 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 28
stats.description: Return with the news to Admiral McArthur at the Vorsran Research Station.
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: ”That’s terrible news. I guess that ruined the chance of ever getting ending this war. Leave me... I need some time to think.“

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 5
stats.description: You recognized that special kind of alien species very well, you have definitely encountered one before. You feel you better go talk to Xhargreg, right away.Xhargreg was last seen at the Abandoned Factory in Fulzar
stats.completeDescription: Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz!”Crew: “Eeeek! Not again! Please, Captain let’s go somewhere else?” Giant Mutated Wasp: *sad bzzz*

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 8
stats.description: Destroy the Motherbrain in Neurona to help Ono stop the rapid infestation and get rid of this abomination once and for all.
stats.completeDescription: We successfully destroyed the Motherbrain but there is no indication of any change on infestation. It's apparent from the remnants that the Motherbrain indeed was created by the Nezerians, however it must have been a failure as it was completely out of control.

stats.label: (timed): Zap-zap-zap! (37-0)
stats.title: Zap-zap-zap!
stats.description: Captain, we need you to kill [amount] of Nezerian fighters in Sarkinon. Please do it quickly!

stats.label: The New Frontier: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: The New Frontier: Part 6
stats.description: Collect 10 bionic implants that is going to be used for research.
stats.completeDescription: Agent ace: “Hmm… that took a long time, but at least you’re still alive. I was afraid we had lost yet another pilot. The bionic implants are extremely important and we thank you for the effort. As a reward, take these resources and invest them wisely in upgrades. There also a few spare artifacts in the armory. You will need it!”

stats.label: (timed): Brain Dead (22-0)
stats.title: Brain Dead
stats.description: Bloody macrophages have been known to scramble the human brains of those who are not careful. Stay long enough in the poison and you will go crazy.

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Launcher! (5-0)
stats.title: Kill the Launcher!
stats.description: There is a Launcher protecting Dustla. This enemy carries powerful missiles that penetrate our armor. Take it down!

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 4  (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 4
stats.description: Destroy hostile ships and salvage as much as you can, about 50 pieces of Metal Scrap should be a good start. Lieutenant Kreiger promised to get us a good deal on metal junk.
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “I managed to negotiate a special deal on the junk, if you go to the Antor Federation Smelting Plant you’ll get at least twice the normal rate.“

stats.label: Endless Invasions (0-0)
stats.title: Endless Invasions
stats.description: Lieutenant John: "Hyperion is under attack by slavers. Please help us defend civilians on Erath by destroy ing 35 slavers.  Beware, they constantly get reinforcements from the outskirts of this solarsystem. "
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant John: "Good work captain, we have rescued a lot of civilians that had been captured. I hope these resources will do as payment."

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 13 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 13
stats.description: Give the nearly-exploding dread moth larva to the sponge for dinner.
stats.completeDescription: Intelligent Sponge: “btza zzaa z”Krux: “baa z zz zzartz”Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp**EXPLOSION*Krux: *shocked*Crew: “Err… I think we just killed the sponge. Krux seem okay though, although somewhat disoriented maybe, we should take him home again.”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 20 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 20
stats.description: Bring the Renegade Defector to the small planet located at the coordinates x: 887, y: 220 in Vibrilian.
stats.completeDescription: Renegade Defector: “Thank you! I’m finally safe again. So, what do you want to know? You want to find the Nezerians? Why? Are you insane..?? Ok Ok… I’ll tell you everything I know. The Nezerians have an outpost in Sarkinon. We, the Renegades used to be the AF Black Ops Division. Only few hundreds of survived the massacre in Azuron. We will never forget what we saw that day. The Renegades are sworn to take revenge on the accursed Nezerians. To end their miserable existence and avenge all our fallen comrades. The difference in strength was just too great… we decided to give up anything in order to obtain power. But recently they have gone to far. I can’t put a blind eye to it any longer.. I didn’t mind the stealing… but the torture, the countless murders and the horrific experiments. Everything just to get a technological advantage against the damned Nezerians. There is one more thing you should know… the reason the Nezerians came to Azuron… it was not for us… slaughtering our fleets was just a pastime while they waited… for the golden ones...”

stats.label: (timed): Alpha Hunt Hozar (12-0)
stats.title: Alpha Hunt Hozar
stats.description: There is a large moth nest in Hozar. Please kill [amount] alphas and you will be greatly rewarded.

stats.label: (timed): Nexar Cluster (90-0)
stats.title: Nexar Cluster
stats.description: As with other Nexar fighter types these also have short range but possess powerful weaponary. Keep your distance and shoot it down by kiting. Be careful not to approach it while having other Nexars on your tail.

stats.label: (timed): Nexar “Nuke” Threat (92-0)
stats.title: Nexar “Nuke” Threat
stats.description: Upon entering Vorsran we have discovered an alien spacecraft equipped with cloaking technology and a type of nuke, we call it the Nexar Bomb. To secure our presence here we need to keep those things off the base or they will blow us apart and possibly even break our safe zone shield.

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Launchers! (9-0)
stats.title: Kill the Launchers!
stats.description: The Launchers are equipped with a powerful homing missile launcher that can deal great amounts of damage. Take them down, fast!

stats.label: Reach Level 30 (30-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 30
stats.description: You are truly one of a kind! Only a few have shown us this kind of progress and devotion. We need your loyalty, Captain. Are you on our side?

stats.label: (timed): Thorn Ambush (10-0)
stats.title: Thorn Ambush
stats.description: Jagged Stars have been found all over the Gellan quadrant. Weed them out and you will be rewared.

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 4
stats.description: Jahaar agreed to create the weapon for you, but only if you help him gethering data on the Elite Stalkers in the Hyperion system. They have hindered him in his quest for new technologies long enough and he wants to know how they can be defeated. Obtain this data by killing 3 Elite Stalkers in Hyperion.
stats.completeDescription: We just received an emergency distress call from Jahaar on Centurion. Something has happened...

stats.label: (timed): Fanatic Invasion (11-0)
stats.title: Fanatic Invasion
stats.description: [player], we have discovered a Fanatic outpost in Kritillian. We have to elminate them before they can fortify their positions. Complete the mission and we will transfer the reward immediately.

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 7 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 7
stats.description: Pick up 10 Polyhedric Fabric that we can trade for steel.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: “Ahh… yes, this is a spectacular material, its impervious to all kinds of energy weapons and almost impenetrable by physical force. No wonder the Aureus dominate this region of space. Ohh.. I almost forgot your share.Now.. I have heard that rumours about an abstract kind of energy ship that the Aureus can project. When they are destroyed the projection oscillators sometimes stay intact. I would really love to get hold of one of those. Bring me with you and let me handle the tractor beam..”

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 9
stats.description: Gather some materials to help Mark fix his ship, 350 pieces of scrap metal should be enough.

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 5
stats.description: Return to Dr. Mira on Rocky in Kapello.
stats.completeDescription: Dr. Mira: “That sounds very ominous, we really have to discover what happened and who the attackers were. Maybe Hyperion is next? Or perhaps we are? All we know is that the warp gate in the system was destroyed in the battle. No signals have been received from Azuron for the last three years. I’ve scoured this entire system by now there are now more clues here. We should head to Durian next. Drop me off at the Anchorhead Cantina.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 32 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 32
stats.description: Make your way to Fulzar and contact Admiral Ymer.
stats.completeDescription: Admiral Ymer “Yes, the situation here is bad. Although not as bad as it could have been. The Nezerians and the Aureus, so called the ‘Golden Ones’ are too busy fighting each other to bother with us. Contact Operative Smith, I think he’s got a plan… and if I know him by now it will certainly involve a kidnapping”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 26 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 26
stats.description: Kidnap an Nezerian Scientist from the Nezerian Research facility located at the coordinates x: -291 y: 683 in Sarkinon.
stats.completeDescription: Nezerian Scientist: “Nahgreh zarreph ghaark! GHAARK! GHAARK!”

stats.label: (timed): Ice Breaker (11-0)
stats.title: Ice Breaker
stats.description: We have discovered moths with freeze acid. Please find them and eliminate [amount] for a good cause.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 9
stats.description: Report back to Operative Smith in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “This was unexpected news... and potentially very useful… Since you already know someone of this species… you will have to follow this up. Your new mission is to find out more about this new species from your contact Xhargreg. What’s this species called? Where do they attack from? What are their weaknesses?”

stats.label: (timed): The Evil Stalkers (5-0)
stats.title: The Evil Stalkers
stats.description: We can't guarantee the safety of space travellers with this many Stalkers around. Help us take them down. And please Captain, do it fast, we have had too many casualties already...

stats.label: Stolen Technology: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Stolen Technology: Part 3
stats.description: Land on Eufelion and Axalon to look for clues about those responsbile for the raid on Arborea.
stats.completeDescription: Captain, we have found something interesting. The three infested planets seem to act as an emitter relay that distort our sensors.  However, we found weak signal indicating a hidden station in this system.We should head for those coordinates.

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Beamer! (6-0)
stats.title: Kill the Beamer!
stats.description: There is a nasty Beamer orbiting Illion in Durian, please help us take it down Captain [player]!

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 21 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 21
stats.description: Bring the scan data to the AF Research station located next to the Vorsran Warp Gate.
stats.completeDescription: AF Scientist: “Most interesting, the planet lacks an atmosphere and any breathable gasses… quite the harsh environment for living on. This probably means that the Nexar doesn’t use sound for communication. Perhaps this explains why they haven’t answered any of our communication attempts. Strange… I read your report about Xhargreg… seems like he was able to speak. Anyway back to the war… Admiral McArthur requested that you assist in capturing the Nexar Recycle station located in the 2nd ring.”

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 2
stats.description: Operative Smith: “Bring the remains to the AFIS HQ station in Arrenius, perhaps they can reconstruct an image of what it used to look like… before you blew it up.”
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “What have you got for us this time? Really???? You want me to do what??  Sigh.. I wonder why I signed up for this line of work.Okok… I’ll get to work.. To complete this task I’ll need some supplies from the AF Research Station here in Arrenius.“

stats.label: The Cult: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: The Cult: Part 3
stats.description: Go back to the Anchorhead Cantina and give Jane the data chip. Beware of any ambush attempts from the Cult.
stats.completeDescription: Jane: "Pssst... Yeees, that is a sharp edge on your throat.. Did anyone follow you here? .... now, show me the data chip. Hmm... I need to take this to a friend of mine to decode the data. I will stay in hiding here while you take the data chip to my friend. The situation is very tense around here after you stole from the cultist's, we have a bounty on our head now.. they only care about their beliefs and would not hesitate to kill us both to protect it."

stats.label: Another Dimension: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Another Dimension: Part 4
stats.description: Lieutenant Reiland: "We have bad news, Abraham is an imposter that infiltrated our command structure. He managed to trick us into believing the Renegades were experimenting with a weapon of mass destruction when they actually were trying to prevent the black hole from expanding. I will explain more once you come to the warp gate in Kapello.
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Reiland: "I am truly surprised, Abraham was one of our best Lieutenants. But his betrayal will not go unpunished.Our internal investigation indicates he is a fanatic priest and a double agent to the fanatics. His mission was to unleash the "true gods" into the Antor System. Their goal is to put fear and terror into everyday citizens to make them believe in god.We need you to hunt down Abraham and punish him for his treason."

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 9
stats.description: Ono was very disappointed  that the infestation rate didn't change. However, she asked if we could do her a last favour and drop her off at the Hangar near the Nezerian invasion force in Sarkinon.
stats.completeDescription: Ono thanked us one last time and told us to give this data chip to Osho. He knows what to do with it. Also, she wanted us to tell Osho she is sorry about what happened and that she can't go back now.

stats.label: (timed): Hive Metal! (76-0)
stats.title: Hive Metal!
stats.description: Kill a Bionic Queen and help the federation to combat this nasty enemy. The reward is great!

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 4
stats.description: Travel to Aladivin in Sarkinon and collect Amygdala Ooze.
stats.completeDescription: Crew: “Captain, we have the Ooze secured in our cargo hold. It’s a really juicy organism, I wonder what the sponge wants to do with it.”

stats.label: (timed): Bionic Macropahes! (70-0)
stats.title: Bionic Macropahes!
stats.description: They are similar to the macrophages at Polueno, but this time they have a bionic shield and are even tougher.

stats.label: (timed): Anti-fighter! (65-0)
stats.title: Anti-fighter!
stats.description: Destroy [amount] Nezerian fighters in Fulzar and helpt the federation to secure its territory against the Nezerian faction.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 6
stats.description: Go to the Warp Gate in Kritillian.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Apart from the insectoids there are two sentient factions present in this area… they might be able to serve as a useful source of intel… the so called ‘Fanatics’ and the ‘Renegades’... lets flip coins on who get what… *flips a coin*... oh.. lucky… you get the Fanatics… go kidnap a Fanatic Pilot… and bring him to the AFIS HQ in Arrenius… for further processing”

stats.label: The New Frontier: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: The New Frontier: Part 4
stats.description: Talk to and assist Agent Ace at the upgrade station.
stats.completeDescription: Agent Ace: “Ah… we have a new fellow in our ranks. Do you even know what you are up against? …. I thought so. To achieve anything meningful we need to use guerilla tactics, we can’t just attack the Nezerians head on, they are much to powerful for that. Instead we have to pick them off one by one before we can strike against one of their battle stations. Also, they have polyhedric coating that gives them full resistance against corrosive weapons and a strong kinetic plating, so I would strongly advice you to use energy weapons.You can start by attacking a few Nezerian fighters at the outer region. You should be familiar with them already so they should be an easy target.”

stats.label: (timed): The Nexar Elite (100-0)
stats.title: The Nexar Elite
stats.description: The Nexar Elite is made up by the best fighters in the Nexar Fleet. Nothing is known about the Shadow type. No one sent after a Shadow have ever returned…

stats.label: (timed): Seeker and Destroy (6-0)
stats.title: Seeker and Destroy
stats.description: The Seekers are keeping us from accessing the surface of planets in the Kapello and Hyperion systems. Help us hunt them now, Captain!

stats.label: (timed): Elite Triad Destruction (12-0)
stats.title: Elite Triad Destruction
stats.description: Captain, we need to destroy a group of elite Triads. They were last seen around the planet of Daren. Be careful, it is not an easy mission.

stats.label: (timed): Recycle [amount] (10-0)
stats.title: Recycle [amount]
stats.description: Shooting stuff down is all fun and games, but we also need to keep it real and clean. It's time you show us some responsibility and recycle [amount] units of Big Metal Scrap.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 14 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 14
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”I have an excellent idea.. I need you to bring me a few samples of brain tissue from that failure in Neurona…”*Collect 8 Samples of Brain Tissue from the Mother Brain in Neurona*
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Hurry back! We are on the brink of a breakthrough here! Hahaharrhrgheheh…”

stats.label: Enemy takedown (1-0)
stats.title: Enemy takedown
stats.description: Welcome to the chaos, Captain! We need your help, take down [h]10[/h] enemies of any kind and receive a well deserved reward.Have funsies!

stats.label: (PvP-7) A new weapon (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-7) A new weapon
stats.description: Since you managed to join us in the Blood-Claw band ... we've got a piece of information for you ... We've finally managed to complete a brand new and brutal weapon: The Blood-Claw S28 Smart Gun. It excells at killing small maneuverable ships. If you can manage to gain 5000 rep ... we'll share this technology with you. It's a tough task ... but if you can manage, it should be well worth the effort!

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 4
stats.description: Goto AFIS HQ in Arrenius
stats.completeDescription: AF Agent: “That was fast.. sigh.. I guess I have to get on with reconstructing the corpse then…”Several hours laterAF Agent: “This is the best I can do… Oh? You think recognize this species? I didn’t expect that. Who is this Xhargreg you speak of?”Go search for Xhargreg at the Abandoned Factory in Fulzar

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 30 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 30
stats.description: Return to AFIS HQ with the kidnapped Nezerian Scientist and Dr. Mira.Nezerian Scientist: “Fharg gak kraka zhur...”Dr. Mira: “Hmmm….”Nezerian Scientist: “Gak?”
stats.completeDescription: Dr. Mira: “I can use the previous data I obtained from the Dominator to translate.”Nezerian Scientist:  “GHAARK!!!”Dr. Mira: “He said ‘HELP!!’”Operative Smith: “Tell him… ‘No.’”Dr. Mira: “Hurag hark”Nezerian Scientist: “Fharg gak kraka zhur. Harga nuur zharg kraka zherphek zhur...”Dr. Mira: “He said ‘Let me go, I don’t have time for this nonsense’”Nezerian Scientist: “Hujarh nur kjajarh…. Kark!”Dr. Mira: “You are insignificant… Worthless!”*2 hours laterOperative Smith: “Yawn… he won’t say anything useful... all we’ve found is that they don’t know who we are… and they most certainly don’t care… they just see us as target practise… he seems to really fear something… something they refer to only as... the golden ones.. somewhere inside Fulzar… you should report our findings to Admiral Cheng in Arrenius… they need to know what to prepare for...”

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 23 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 23
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Well done! That was a really nasty enemy. Defeating the Nexar Elite is not going to be an easy task. There might be another option avilable... I have received the report based on your scan data. Apparently the Nexar are unable to use sound for communication. Perhaps it’s time for a new attempt at negotiating. For this we will need the help of that madman Xhargreg… please try to convince him to help us.”
stats.description: Admiral McArthur: “A new threat have been reported, a force called the Nexar Elite is defending the inner circles. Your next task is to find and defeat a member of the Nexar Elite.”

stats.label: (timed): Nexar Anti-repair (90-0)
stats.title: Nexar Anti-repair
stats.description: The repair probes have caused a lot of trouble for the federation in our attempt to reach the middle of the Vorsran system. They can be located in the inner rings and are difficult to track down. If you have the opportunity, please destroy them on sight.

stats.label: (PvP) Reputation (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP) Reputation
stats.description: Get 5 more kills. When you kill someone in PvP combat you gain reputation. If you're hostile and attacking other neutral players you'll get 'Pirate Reputation' - on the other hand, if you're not hostile, or act in defence of others, you'll get 'Police Reputation'.

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 2
stats.description: Land on Fexucius in Sarkinon and show Krux the recording of the new lifeform.
stats.completeDescription: Krux: “Ohh.. you again, or maybe I mistake you for another one. I don’t see many bipedal species nowadays. But you have a very interesting recording I must say, last time I was on Barbulos the sponge was completely silent and it didn’t seem to be sentient at all. Something must have sparked its interest. You need to take me there!”

stats.label: (timed): Bone Excavation! (30-0)
stats.title: Bone Excavation!
stats.description: The infamous Ossakel is a known space pirate and he was last spotted in the Kritilian system. Find and destroy his ship for us.

stats.label: Reach Level 35 (35-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 35
stats.description: We can see you're aiming for the top, and we like it! Your powers are increasing every minute. Reach this impressive level and we will make sure you are rewarded.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 1
stats.description: Lieutenant Nguyen:  ”Captain, we received a message for you, unfortunately due to static interference we were just able to decode two words: ‘Bug’ and ‘Legs’. I wonder what that could possibly mean… well I don’t have time for this so I’ll leave it up to you to figure out.”“Find Xhargreg somewhere in Fulzar.”
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”What took you so long? There’s an emergency of untold proportions unfolding here. The world is in dire need of saving! And you were busy doing… uhm… exactly… what? You must hurry! Head over to the Hozar system already, I will contact you again once you get to the Warp Gate.”

stats.label: (timed): Junk pickup (3-0)
stats.title: Junk pickup
stats.description: Don't leave the junk in space Captain, it can be recycled into refined minerals. Those minerals are essential when upgrading our ship.

stats.label: (timed): Design Effort 2(100-0)
stats.title: Design Effort 2
stats.description: Help us develop our Nezerian ship designs by gathering the necessary amount of Bionic Implants for the Prototypes.

stats.label: Another Dimension: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Another Dimension: Part 1
stats.description: AF Lieutenant Abraham: "Greetings captain, I really need your help. We have recieved information about a dangerous experiment run by the renegades. We are not completely sure what it is yet, but we need you to infiltrate the Renegade Stronghold on the planet Glictan in Zergilin. Hopefully we will find out what they are up to."
stats.completeDescription: AF Lieutenant Abraham: "Perfect, tap into their central data bank and search for something related to "project nether". Our prediction is that they are trying to create a weapon of mass destruction.Did you find it? Yes... Thats it! You found what we were looking for. Take this small reward and wait for further instructions."

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 10
stats.description: Land on the mysterious stataion and take back what's yours (in Durian at x = 415, y = -722). Reclaim the data chip with the weapon blueprints.
stats.completeDescription: The renegades had just managed to finish the first prototype of a new weapon. Luckily we were able to liberate it!*hint: The weapon will be attached to your current ship.

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 14 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 14
stats.completeDescription: Black Market Merchant: “Thank you very very much! This will make my life a lot easier. I will keep my end of the bargain. The person you are looking for came past here a few days, I sold him a new ship and some replicated weapons. He was last seen warping to Mitrilion, he’s probably laying low on some planet there.”
stats.description: Assist the Black Market Merchant by killing 60 Moth Alphas in Hozar.

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 5  (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 5
stats.description: Go to the Antor Federation Smelting Plant and recycle the junk, Lieutenant Kreiger promised that you’ll receive a big bonus.
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “By now you should have enough resources to upgrade some of your tech by now. Head over to the Antor Federation Research Station, I’ll ask them to share some of their know-how.”

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 4
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Now that the dreadful ‘bug leg crisis’ finally has been resolved... we can go back to the less important issues… have you by any chance noticed the situation in Fulzar?  The most distressing part... is... that there doesn’t seem to be any new bugs here... *sob*... I mean… what’s the use of exploring a new system if there are no bugs around? *sob* We should focus on resolving this issue...”

stats.label: Weapons Cartel: Part 4 (0-0)
stats.title: Weapons Cartel: Part 4
stats.description: AF Transmission: "The Graven stronghold in Arrenius has been the central node for an underground weapons cartel. We need you to eliminate the Elite Gunners and Elite Lanchers so that we can infiltrate it."
stats.completeDescription: AF Transmission: "It looks like we have found a few interesting things while you attacked Graven. Apparently the weapons are transported via Kapello.Its probably the supply line for all enemy strongholds in the Antor system. We need to put at stop to it."

stats.label: (timed): Massacre 1! (20-0)
stats.title: Massacre 1!
stats.description: Kill [amount] enemies of any kind. Just be quick and don't let the chat slow you down!

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 25 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 25
stats.description: Xhargreg agreed to help for the low low price of 42 Bug Legs… What's he doing with all the Bug Legs anyway?
stats.completeDescription: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar with the Bug Legs!

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 18 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 18
stats.description: Bring the Renegade Defector to AFIS HQ in Arrenius.
stats.completeDescription: Renegade Defector: “Here??? You think this place is safe? Not a chance!”AF Agent: “This is probably the safest place in the galaxy… for some at least… hehe…”Renegade Defector: “You clearly don’t know much… the Renegades will hunt me to the ends of the universe if they have to.. ”AF Agent: “Ingrateful! We could just interrogate you… we’ll have you talking in minutes...”Renegade Defector: “I’ll never talk… I would be dead either way”Operative Smith: “Let’s not get hastily here… specify your terms…“Renegade Defector: “Just find me a safe place to hide..”

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 3
stats.description: To complete the task of reconstructing the corpse the AF Agent requires some supplies from the AF Research Station here in Arrenius.
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Keryn: “Hi there hero! Long time no see. What’s Fulzar like?A supply request? Sure I’ll get the supplies you requested right away!”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 33 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 33
stats.description: Find Operative Smith in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “Ah there you are… I have a cunning plan… “Crew Member: “Let me guess… you want us to kidnap an Aures Pilot?”Operative Smith: “How did you know about my top secret plan?”Crew Member: “It’s the same plan everytime!”Operative Smith: “Hrrrmmm… let’s just get on with it…”

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 15 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 15
stats.description: Talk to Lieutenant Kreiger at the Antor Federation Armoury in Hyperion.
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “That’s some really bad news you got there, a hostile alien race capable of warp travel without the use of warp gates… that means they could appear anywhere, anytime, without any warning. Thanks for the warning, I’ll spread this information to the remnants of the Antor Federation. We need to prepare for the worst… There’re still one questions remaining… and that’s the why… why did they attack Azuron?”

stats.label: Reach Level 40 (40-0)
stats.title: Reach Level 40
stats.description: You are outstanding captain! We never expected you to become such an excellent leader with superb fighting and decision making skills. However, we still have yet another mission.

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 8
stats.description: Land on the planet and checks what’s going on.*Hint: Use the opportunity to scavenge the planet for minerals
stats.completeDescription: We arrived just in time, it seems like the slavers didn’t have time to land on the planet yet, everyone in the colony is safe!

stats.label: (timed): Recycle [amount] (6-0)
stats.title: Recycle [amount]
stats.description: Recycle times! We need you to bring [amount] units of scrap to the recycle station, Captain.

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 1
stats.description: Sergeant Reiland: “Welcome to Kapello, I’ve heard from Lieutenant Kreiger that you’re quite competent. Dr. Mira, a scientist and historian told me she wanted to talk to you about something. She’s apparently doing some research related to Azuron. If you’re interested, she is on Rocky in Kapello.”
stats.completeDescription: We found Dr. Mira in an ice cave trying to communicate with some strange ice worms. Rather confusing ones… She quickly noticed us and abandoned the ice worms to rush over... Dr. Mira: “Just the one I’ve been looking for! Get over here, I’ve so much things to ask you. I hope you don’t mind if I record our conversation? For the records of course… You’re from Azuron, right? What happened back there? Common tell me already! I must know! You don’t know? Well now.. that’s really disappointing. Lately there has been so many refugees, something terrible must have happened? Do you remember anything apart from being under attack? Do you want to help me uncover the truth about Azuron?

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 3 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 3
stats.description: Land on Oshos Upgrades in Arrenius and collect the money he owes John.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: "The next guy that owes can be quite tricky to find. He is a missing AF Agent that was last seen on the planet Vlardenon in the Sarkinon system."

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 10 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 10
stats.description: ”Kill 32 Renegade Spies and collect samples from their Corrosive Missiles”
stats.completeDescription: Crew: “we received a message from Xhargreg, it goes something like: ‘Bzzzz! Bzzzz! BZZZZ!!!’”Crew: “Maybe we should return and check if Xhargreg is ok…”Crew: “or run away to a guaranteed wasp free place…”

stats.label: An Unknown Threat: Part 19 (0-0)
stats.title: An Unknown Threat: Part 19
stats.description: Bring the Renegade Defector to the Warp Gate Vribrilian.
stats.completeDescription: Operative Smith: “We have located a small plant far outside the main system… perhaps this will do? There’s absolutely nothing there.. except for bugs… it’s located at the coordinates x: 887, y: 220”Renegade Defector: “Yes, bring me there alive… and I’ll tell you everything I know.”

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 5
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”Here’s your reward; you’ll get to kill 888 ice-moths and gather their rather peculiar ice venom. Happy? What? No?? You can even keep their squishy eyes for yourself! What could be better? Now get going, I need a nap."
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Finally... that took forever... Zzzz.. are you even trying? Return to me with the poison... and please... do it before the world ends... "

stats.label: Stalker takedown (1-3)
stats.title: Stalker takedown
stats.description: The Stalkers are heavy fireing units that can be a real pain. Help us clearing out 5 of them and recive a nice reward.

stats.label: (timed): Transport assistance (6-0)
stats.title: Transport assistance
stats.description: We need some urgent supplies transferred from [location1] to [location2]. Do you have time to help us?

stats.label: (timed): Guards, Guards! (13-0)
stats.title: Guards, Guards!
stats.description: We have had trouble with elite Guardians in the Kapello system, near Mari. Head out there and destroy any Guardians you see.

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 8 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 8
stats.description: A suspicious looking insectoid lurking in a corner offered to sell us the coordinates of this secret renegade base. It requested that we scout the planets: Valen, Anvol and Valden. And that we mark the locations of any valuable resources.Do you think we really can trust it? I mean... look at it!?!
stats.completeDescription: We hope the insectoid held up its end of the bargain. It gave us the following coordinates in Durian: x = 415, y = -722You should head there as soon as possible. I don’t think these guys are ready for any negotiations and we should expect a tough battle.

stats.label: Unknown Data: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: Unknown Data: Part 9
stats.description: The Renegade research facility should be located at the coordinates: x = 415, y = -722, located in the Durian star system. We should head there as soon as possible, I don’t think these guys are ready for any negotiations, we should expect a tough battle. *hint: You can see your coordinates in the lower left corner of the map screen*

stats.label: (timed): Nexar Skirmish (90-0)
stats.title: Nexar Skirmish
stats.description: The Skirmisher seems to be the weakest Nexar ship around, but it is still deadly and has earned its place in the Nexar Fleet. It is equipped with a powerful plasma like weapon which attacks the energy suppressors in our ships. If you destroy a few of these we will give you an appropriate reward.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 6 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 6
stats.description: Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”It works!! HAHAhahahehheh... *coughing*… I think it likes you!”Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz!”Crew “Eeeek!” Xhargreg: ”Excellent! But we are not done yet! Lets think bigger! ”Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz??”

stats.label: New Lifeform: Part 9 (0-0)
stats.title: New Lifeform: Part 9
stats.description: Hand over the gagged Nezerian soldier to the sponge at Barbulos in Vibrilian.
stats.completeDescription: Krux: “bzrtzzz zz zzaz”Intelligent Sponge: “btza zz zzssarrat ttzzaaz” *Gulp*Krux: “artifacts… bz.. yours… bzzztaazz”Crew: “I think we better move out of here, the spores have infected his brain somehow..”Krux: “ztaazz!”

stats.label: (PvP-2) Make a name (2-0)
stats.title: (PvP-2) Make a name
stats.description: Nice work blowing up all those ships! It's time to get noticed and make a name for yourself. If you can manage to make enough noice you'll be welcome to join us, the Space Pirate Guild. Kill any player you can find, we don't care who you target, the weaker the better! If you can take down 25 ships you can join us and have a share of our latest plunder.

stats.label: (timed): Nexar Fight (90-0)
stats.title: Nexar Fight
stats.description: The fighter is an average class Nexar ship equipped with a blaster type weapon. This is probably the most standard type of enemy you can find in Vorsran and shouldn’t be a problem for an experienced pilot like you.

stats.label: (timed): Zlatte takedown (3-0)
stats.title: Zlatte takedown
stats.description: The Zlattes might seem like small and easy targets. But we have encountered them in big numbers and then they are a real pain to deal with. Take down [amount] Zlatte Captain.

stats.label: Eldorado: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Eldorado: Part 2
stats.description: Goto the Warp Gate in Vibrilian.
stats.completeDescription: John McClain: “Ohhh…. the warp license is pretty expensive… well. I guess I could offer you a deal, a lot of people owe me money and I need someone to collect them for me. I will give you 5% if you do it quickly. I’m eager to look for new climbing gear in Hangar 2.”

stats.label: (timed): Thorn Ambush II (17-0)
stats.title: Thorn Ambush II
stats.description: These sinister plants need to be exterminated. Kill [amount] of them and collect your reward.

stats.label: (timed): Hells Touchdown! (50-0)
stats.title: Hells Touchdown!
stats.description: Rumour has spread that Efedrit is a place where nobody has ever visited and come back alive. If you manage to land on Efedrit you are truly skillful, or you just teleported to your awesome friend.

stats.label: Questions about that past: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: Questions about that past: Part 2
stats.description: Dr. Mira: “If you want to help me uncover the truth about Azuron, it could be worth speaking to Wrengher Jones, he runs a recycle station here in Kapello. He was one of the first refugees to arrive here, however he refuses to talk to me. Perhaps you can be more persuasive?”
stats.completeDescription: Wrengher Jones: “What the hell do you want? I don’t have any time if you aren’t here for business. Just get out of here already…”

stats.label: (timed): Transport assistance (6-0)
stats.title: Transport assistance
stats.description: We need some urgent supplies transferred from [location1] to [location2]. Do you have time to help us?

stats.label: (timed): Deep Waters (18-0)
stats.title: Deep Waters
stats.description: A scientific analysis of the biological research in Mitrilion proves the existence of Space Squids. Kill and collect [amount] samples for us.

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 11 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 11
stats.description: Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with the Deamon toxins.
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Good good, I’ve come quite far in my research, just look at this.. *dribbles some unspeakable liquid on the floor*... oh and don’t mind the corpse pile in the corner over there… they all volunteered in the name of science.Do you know of the Nezerians? I might have been working with them, a long time ago… before some.. hundreds of unfortunate and *totally* accidental deaths… Hehehehghrhrhgr... anyway since I left them I believe they have perfected their bioengineering equipment. I need you to go and *borrow* some of that equipment, you should be able to salvage enough from one Battle Ship."

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 22 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 22
stats.description: AF Scientist: “Most interesting, the planet lacks an atmosphere and any breathable gasses… quite the harsh environment for living on. This probably means that the Nexar doesn’t use sound for communication. Perhaps this explains why they haven’t answered any of our communication attempts. Strange… I read your report about Xhargreg… seems like he was able to speak. Anyway back to the war… Admiral McArthur requested that you assist in capturing the Nexar Recycle station located in the 2nd ring.”
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Excellent, seems like your reputation didn’t actually exceed you. This war is starting to go very well for us now. However a new threat have been reported, a force called the Nexar Elite is defending the inner circles. Your next task is to find and defeat a member of the Nexar Elite.”

stats.label: A New Beginning: Part 1 (0-0)
stats.title: A New Beginning: Part 1
stats.completeDescription: Lieutenant Kreiger: “You’re still alive? That’s quite surprising.. I thought you’d be someones dinner by now. Here’s some steel, resources are essential for long term survival. I’m going to have you prove your worth.”
stats.description: Lieutenant Kreiger: “Great, yet another refugee from Azuron. The last thing I needed… this sector have been flooded by your kind lately. I got some bad news, I doubt you’ll even last one day…  If you want to survive you need to learn how to fight, and you need to learn fast. If you want any help you’ll have to earn it. Go kill 10 of those so called “Seekers” that are swarming the area. And by the way, a small hint: they are cannibals so don’t even think of surrendering.”

stats.label: (timed): Recycle [amount] (3-0)
stats.title: Recycle [amount]
stats.description: The excess junk left over in a recycle is used for researching new weapons. We need you to bring in some more junk and recycle it.

stats.label: Bug Legs: Part 22 (0-0)
stats.title: Bug Legs: Part 22
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”I need some fuel for the teleportation device… I’m going to have to extract it from Radiated Junk… gather 1024 pieces of it..“Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: “Bzz!”Crew: “Bzz to you too!Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: *Happy Bzz!*

stats.label: (timed): Kill the Guardian! (6-0)

stats.label: The Infestation: Part 5 (0-0)
stats.title: The Infestation: Part 5
stats.description: Goto Polueno in Zergilin and kill 2 Macrophages to give Ono some samples to dissect and study. She will be monitoring their energy signature and behaviour while we attack.
stats.completeDescription: Captain, Ono says she found something very interesting. It seem like there is a huge bioenergy reading in the middle of this system. She suspect that there is a Queen here and she insists that we have to kill it. It might reveal more about the insects and whats behind the rapid infestation.

stats.label: Counter attack! - Part 13 (0-0)
stats.title: Counter attack! - Part 13
stats.description: Contact Admiral McArthur, at the Research Station here in Vorsran.
stats.completeDescription: Admiral McArthur: “Greetings Captain, I have heard a lot about you from Admiral Ymer. It’s a pleasure to finally meet you in person. It’s time to get to work. We have to do something about those bombers, it’s going to be extremely difficult to keep our foothold here with those bombers operating freely. Our defence forces are helpless due to the enemy's stealth technology.”

stats.label: The Ultimate Poison: Part 2 (0-0)
stats.title: The Ultimate Poison: Part 2
stats.description: Xhargreg: ”Good job, now bring all that poison to me at my research station in Zergilin."
stats.completeDescription: Xhargreg: ”Why hello there! Who might you be? Oh look at all that green poison!!! Gimme! I need a few seconds to examine it..."*45 minutes later*Xhargreg: ”Why are you still here? Stop bothering me I’m busy!"*2 hours and 50 minutes later*Xhargreg: ”This poison is fantastic! I just came up with a new research topic, let’s make the perfect poison!What are you talking about? A reward? Sure, here are few bug legs, enjoy!"
